1508600023.english: It has changed into a hideous form in the short time I haven't seen it.
1508600023.korean: 잠깐 못 본 사이 추악한 모습으로 바뀌었군요.

1508600024.english: Just before touching the approaching tentacles, Lilith deployed Rosa Azule in mid-air, and using it as a stepping stone, changed her trajectory in mid-air and rapidly approached Zeta.
1508600024.korean: - 리리스는 다가온 촉수에 닿기 직전 공중에서 로자 아쥴을 전개했고, 그걸 발판 삼아 공중에서 궤도를 바꾸어 제타에게 빠르게 접근했다.

1508600025.english: Dozens of bullets fired mercilessly as they approached struck Zeta's tentacles and body, and
1508600025.korean: - 접근하며 인정사정없이 발사된 수십발의 탄환은, 제타의 촉수와 몸을 타격했고

1508600027.english: I didn't miss that opportunity and rushed toward Zeta.
1508600027.korean: - 나는 그 기회를 놓치지 않고 제타를 향해 돌진했다.

1508600029.english: The remaining goblins rushed toward me in unison to block my approach.
1508600029.korean: - 나의 접근을 막기 위해 남아 있던 고블린들이 일제히 내 쪽을 향해 달려 나왔다.

1508600031.english: However, Laviata, who hadn't missed a single move, ran up and cut down the goblins blocking her path with a single stroke before I could even give an order.
1508600031.korean: - 하지만 나의 행동을 놓치지 않았던 라비아타는, 내가 지시하기도 전에 달려와 가로막은 고블린들을 단칼에 베어 넘겼다.

1508600032.english: And I fired a bullet at Zeta, who was completely defenseless.
1508600032.korean: - 그리고 완전히 무방비해진 제타를 향해 나는 한 발의 탄환을 발사했다.

1508600034.english: Zeta immediately counterattacked, and tentacles quickly approached me.
1508600034.korean: - 제타는 즉각 반격에 나섰고 나에게 빠르게 촉수가 다가왔다.

1508600036.english: With my words, Zeta's movements came to a complete halt.
1508600036.korean: - 나의 말과 함께 제타의 움직임은 완전히 멈췄다.

1508600037.english: How dare someone like you… give me orders…?
1508600037.korean: 너 따위가 감히… 나에게 명령을 해…?

1508600039.english: You could get seriously hurt if you move, so please stay still. Oh, are you unable to move?
1508600039.korean: 움직이면 크게 다칠 수 있으니 가만히 있으시길.&n아, 움직일 수 없으시려나요?

1508600040.english: Laviata and Lilith destroyed Zeta's weapons to put him in a completely subdued state, just in case.
1508600040.korean: - 라비아타와 리리스는 혹시 모를 상황을 대비해, 제타의 무장을 파괴하여 완전 제압 상태로 만들었다.

1508600042.english: As soon as the battle ended and we realized we had won, I slumped down on the spot.
1508600042.korean: - 전투가 끝나고 우리가 이겼다는 사실을 인지하자 나는 그 자리에 풀썩 주저앉았다.

1508600044.english: I exist to protect my master.

1508600045.english: I'm not entirely sure, but I was able to come here thanks to Alpha's help.
1508600045.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만 알파 님께서 손을 써주셔서 이곳에 올 수 있었습니다.

1508600046.english: It looks like it's all over.

1508600047.english: For now… is that it? Well, that doesn't really matter.
1508600047.korean: 일단은… 인가요.&n뭐, 그런 건 아무래도 좋아요.

1508600048.english: What are you going to do from now on?

1508600051.english: - Omega and Orca are enemies. This is a fact that remains unchanged even now.
1508600051.korean: - 오메가와 오르카는 적이다. 이건 현재로서도 변함없는 사실이다.

1508600052.english: However, after cooperating twice in Caracas and the Iron Workshop, I felt as though I had seen a little bit of her true side.
1508600052.korean: - 하지만 카라카스와 철의 공방에서 두 차례 협조하며 그녀의 진실한 일면을 조금이나마 본 것 같은 기분이 들었다.

1508600053.english: Even though it didn't end well in Caracas, won't it be different this time?
1508600053.korean: - 비록 카라카스 때는 좋지 않게 끝났지만, 이번에는 다르지 않을까?

1508600054.english: The sins Omega has committed so far are heavy. Surely there are members among the Orca who cannot forgive her.
1508600054.korean: - 오메가가 지금까지 지은 죄는 무겁다.&n분명 오르카 중에는 그녀를 용서할 수 없는 대원도 있겠지.

1508600055.english: But… just in case, if Omega wants it… if she sincerely says she will repent for her sins, I…
1508600055.korean: - 하지만… 만에 하나 오메가가 원한다면… 그녀가 진심으로 자신의 죄를 뉘우치겠다고 한다면 나는…

1508600056.english: Master, I am sorry, but there is no guarantee that this place will remain safe, so I think it would be best to hurry back.
1508600056.korean: 주인님, 죄송하지만 여기가 계속 안전하리란 보장은 없으니 서둘러 돌아가는 게 좋겠습니다.

1508600057.english: Because you never know when the portal might close, either.

1508600058.english: I nodded at Laviata's words and stood up from my seat to return.
1508600058.korean: - 라비아타의 말에 나는 고개를 끄덕였고 돌아가기 위해 자리에서 일어섰다.

1508600060.english: It's ridiculous! You don't actually think you've won with this, do you?
1508600060.korean: 우습고 말고! 설마 이걸로 이겼다고 생각하는 건 아니겠지?

1508600061.english: Zeta cannot move under my orders at this moment. All weapons have also been destroyed as a precaution.
1508600061.korean: - 제타는 지금 나의 명령으로 움직일 수 없다.&n혹시 모를 상황을 위해 모든 무장도 파괴한 상태다.

1508600062.english: However, in that face, in that smile, there was something that was by no means baseless confidence.
1508600062.korean: - 하지만 그 얼굴에는, 그 웃음에는 절대로 근거 없는 자신감이 아닌 무언가가 서려 있었다.

1508600064.english: The Last Human, are you afraid of death? How great a fear is it for you to disappear from this world?
1508600064.korean: 마지막 인간, 넌 죽음이 두렵나? 이 세상에서 사라진다는 건 너에게 있어서 얼마나 큰 두려움이지?

1508600065.english: To you, death is probably just fear.

1508600066.english: However, to me, death is nothing more than obedience and faith for 'Him'.
1508600066.korean: 하지만 나에게 있어서 죽음은 '그분'을 위한 복종과 믿음에 지나지 않는다.

1508600067.english: Even if I am gone, there are plenty of replacements to carry on 'His' will.
1508600067.korean: 비록 내가 없어진다고 해도 '그분'의 뜻을 대신 이어갈 대체품은 얼마든지 있으니까.

1508600068.english: At that moment, I recalled the last moments of the goblins that had raided Caracas.
1508600068.korean: - 그 순간 나는 카라카스를 습격했던 고블린들의 마지막 모습을 떠올렸다.

1508600069.english: The true image of death—melting away, burning, and vanishing without a trace… Eventually, I arrived at an ominous possibility.
1508600069.korean: - 녹아내리며 불타올라 흔적도 없이 사라진 진정한 죽음의 모습… 이윽고 나는 한 가지 불길한 가능성에 도달했다.

1508600072.english: Well? Maybe you're not as great as I thought?
1508600072.korean: 글쎄? 생각보다 네가 대단하지 않은 게 아닐까?

1508600078.english: Thank you so much for coming, Lilith.

1508600079.english: Really? I should thank Alpha when I get back.

1508600081.english: First off, you worked hard too, Omega.

1508600082.english: I have to go back to everyone. Fortunately, it doesn't seem like the way back is blocked.
1508600082.korean: 모두에게 돌아가야지. 다행히 돌아갈 길은 막힌 건 아닌 듯하니까.

1508600083.english: … Omega, what are you going to do?

1508600085.english: … What do you want to say?

1508700002.english: - Did I underestimate you... If everyone hadn't protected me...
1508700002.korean: - 얕보고 있었나… 만약 모두가 지켜주지 않았다면…

1508700003.english: Immediately after I shouted for the last time, Laviata and Lilith blocked my path, and Omega, who was nearby, pushed me aside to protect me.
1508700003.korean: - 내가 마지막으로 외친 직후, 라비아타와 리리스는 내 앞을 가로막았고, 근처에 있던 오메가는 나를 몸으로 밀쳐 보호해 주었다.

1508700004.english: And soon, a massive explosion occurred from Zeta, blowing away everything around it.
1508700004.korean: - 그리고 곧 제타에게서 거대한 폭발이 일어났고 주변에 있는 모든 걸 날려버렸다.

1508700005.english: I didn't lose consciousness. If I don't find everyone quickly...
1508700005.korean: - 정신을 잃지는 않았어. 어서 모두를 찾지 않으면…

1508700006.english: Breaking through the thick smoke, I looked around and began searching for the three people.
1508700006.korean: - 자욱한 연기를 뚫고 나는 주변을 둘러보며 세 사람을 찾기 시작했다.

1508700007.english: And soon, I was able to find the two people, Laviata and Lilith.
1508700007.korean: - 그리고 금방 라비아타와 리리스 두 사람을 찾을 수 있었다.

1508700010.english: "- Thankfully, they are breathing. But both of them are seriously injured… If we don't take them to Orca for treatment immediately…"
1508700010.korean: - 다행이야 숨은 쉬고 있어.&n하지만 두 사람 다 중상이야… 어서 빨리 오르카로 데려가 치료하지 않으면…

1508700014.english: When I heard Omega's moan nearby, I started searching the surroundings thoroughly, and soon found Omega.
1508700014.korean: - 근처에서 오메가의 신음이 들리자 나는 주변을 샅샅이 찾기 시작했고, 곧이어 오메가의 모습을 찾았다.

1508700017.english: The surrounding debris collapsed in the aftermath of the explosion, and Omega's lower body was buried in the rubble.
1508700017.korean: - 폭발로 인한 여파로 주변의 잔해들이 붕괴했고, 오메가는 그 잔해 속에 하반신이 파묻혀 있었다.

1508700018.english: hurriedly cleared away the debris that had crushed Omega.
1508700018.korean: - 나는 서둘러 오메가를 깔아뭉갠 잔해들을 치웠다.

1508700019.english: However, clearing away the massive debris alone with a body that was completely exhausted was nearly impossible.
1508700019.korean: - 하지만 지칠 대로 지친 몸으로 거대한 잔해를 혼자서 치우기란 불가능에 가까웠다.

1508700020.english: Still, I didn't give up either. I cleared the debris little by little. Even though I understood in my head that it was impossible, I kept denying that fact.
1508700020.korean: - 그래도 나도 포기하지 않았다. 조금씩 조금씩 잔해를 치웠다. 머릿속으로는 불가능하다는 걸 이해하면서도 그 사실을 계속해서 부정했다.

1508700022.english: That's enough. You... hurry up and take the two of them and get out of here...
1508700022.korean: 이제 됐어요. 당신은 어서... 두 사람을 데리고 여기를 빠져나가세요...

1508700023.english: Because you never know when the door might close.

1508700024.english: Fortunately, the portal created by Zeta was not caught in the explosion, perhaps because it was far away.
1508700024.korean: - 다행히 제타가 만들어낸 포탈은 멀리 떨어져 있던 탓인지 폭발에 휘말리지 않았다.

1508700025.english: However, perhaps because the owner was gone, it was moving unstably, as if it would stop working at any moment.
1508700025.korean: - 하지만 주인이 없어졌기 때문인지 금방이라도 작동을 멈출 것처럼 불안정하게 움직이고 있었다.

1508700026.english: If we don't get out of here right now, we might be trapped forever.
1508700026.korean: - 지금이라도 당장 여기를 빠져나가지 않으면 영영 갇힐지도 모른다.

1508700027.english: I have a favor to ask…

1508700028.english: I would like you to end my life… with your own hands…
1508700028.korean: 저의 마지막은… 당신의 손으로 직접 끝내주셨으면 해요…

1508700029.english: don't have much time left anyway... I will surely watch your retreating figure and close my eyes before long...
1508700029.korean: 어차피 저는 오래 남지 않았어요… 분명 당신의 뒷모습을 지켜보고 머지않아 눈을 감겠죠…

1508700030.english: It must be lonely to be left alone in a place like this…

1508700031.english: And even if you return to where you originally came from… betting on the possibility that I am alive… you would try to find your way back here somehow…
1508700031.korean: 그리고 당신은 원래 있던 곳으로 돌아가더라도… 제가 살아있을 가능성에 걸고…&n어떻게든 다시 이곳으로 찾아오려고 하겠죠…

1508700032.english: They certainly won't give up until the very end.

1508700033.english: Because you are such a… foolishly kind person…

1508700034.english: So… so that you don’t have any lingering regrets… so that I won’t be left alone and lonely… please make me comfortable right here and now…
1508700034.korean: 그러니까… 당신이 미련을 남기지 않도록... 제가 혼자 남아 외롭지 않도록…&n지금 여기서 저를 편안하게 해주세요…

1508700035.english: You are showing me your crying face for my sake as well.

1508700036.english: Omega struggled to move his hand and wiped away the tears I had been shedding before I knew it.
1508700036.korean: - 오메가는 힘겹게 손을 움직여 내가 어느새 흘리고 있던 눈물을 닦아주었다.

1508700037.english: I was satisfied. Because I was able to see the side of you that you only show to those close to you.
1508700037.korean: 만족했어요.&n당신이 가까운 이들에게만 보여주는 모습을 저도 볼 수 있었으니까.

1508700038.english: So, I'm asking for your help.

1508700039.english: took the pistol out of the holster with trembling hands.
1508700039.korean: - 나는 떨리는 손으로 홀스터에서 권총을 꺼냈다.

1508700040.english: I put my finger on the pistol trigger.

1508700041.english: But… my hand refused to move anymore.
1508700041.korean: - 하지만… 더 이상 나의 손은 움직이려고 하지 않았다.

1508700042.english: I'm so glad... to have met you...

1508700043.korean: - 오메가는 떨리고 있는 내 손을 잡아주었다.

1508700044.english: It was fun being with you, even just a little bit...

1508700045.english: And slowly, I turned my hand toward myself.
1508700045.korean: - 그리고 천천히 내 손이 자신을 향하게 했다.

1508700046.english: I think you would have been a good fit to be my new master…
1508700046.korean: 당신이라면 저의 새로운 주인이 되어도 좋았을 거라 생각해요…

1508700047.english: Her slender fingers touched mine, and…
1508700047.korean: - 그녀의 가녀린 손가락은 내 손가락과 맞닿았고…

1508700048.english: If… I have a next life… then… I will definitely… with you…
1508700048.korean: 만약… 저에게 다음 생이 있다면… 그때는… 반드시… 당신과…

1508700049.english: After finishing the fight with Zeta, I was able to return safely with Laviata and Lilith.
1508700049.korean: - 제타와의 싸움을 끝내고 나는 라비아타와 리리스 두 사람과 함께 무사히 돌아올 수 있었다.

1508700050.english: After that, everything was finished quickly without any major difficulties.
1508700050.korean: - 그 뒤로는 큰 어려움이 없이 모든 게 빠르게 마무리되었다.

1508700051.english: Alpha, having completely seized control of the Iron Workshop, resolved the remaining hazards inside the building.
1508700051.korean: - 철의 공방의 제어권을 완전히 손에 넣은 알파는, 건물 내부에 남아 있는 위험 요소를 해결했고.

1508700052.english: The Iron Bugs and Goblins that had lost command were all dealt with by the blocking squad members stationed outside.
1508700052.korean: - 지휘권을 잃은 철충과 고블린들은 외부에 있던 차단조 대원들에 의해 모두 처리되었다.

1508700053.english: - The recapture team succeeded in safely securing Epsilon's body, but it is said that Zeta's subordinate escaped.
1508700053.korean: - 탈환조는 무사히 엡실론의 몸을 확보하는 데 성공했지만, 제타의 부관은 놓쳤다고 한다.

1508700054.english: Although there are still mountains of problems to solve, the assault on the Iron Workshop has safely come to an end in Orca's victory.
1508700054.korean: - 아직 해결해야 할 문제가 산더미처럼 쌓여있지만, 철의 공방 공략전은 무사히 오르카의 승리로 막을 내렸다.

1508700057.english: There's no way I would miss out on a huge battle like this, right?
1508700057.korean: 이런 큰 전투가 있는 곳에 내가 빠질 리가 없잖아?

1508700058.english: Call me anytime for battles in the future.

1508700060.english: Gamma gazed at the simply made tomb in front of me.
1508700060.korean: - 감마는 내 앞에 간소하게 만들어진 무덤을 바라보았다.

1508700061.english: Is this that guy's... Omega's grave?

1508700062.english: Omega must have earned quite a bit of resentment, just like me, so it would be hard to ask the others for help.
1508700062.korean: 오메가도 나와 마찬가지로 꽤 원망을 샀을 테니, 다른 녀석들에게 부탁하기는 힘들겠지.

1508700065.english: Gamma said that, then took a photograph out of his pocket and placed it in front of the grave.
1508700065.korean: - 감마는 그렇게 말하고는 주머니에서 사진 하나를 꺼내 무덤 앞에 놓았다.

1508700066.english: I told you to be prepared when I released it to the public, but I suppose it doesn't matter anymore. Although, Commander, I've already shown you once.
1508700066.korean: 시중에 뿌렸을 때는 각오하라고 했지만, 이젠 아무래도 상관없겠지.&n이미 사령관, 너에게는 한 번 보여줬지만 말이야.

1508700067.english: The lemonades in the photo had a very different atmosphere from what I remember so far.
1508700067.korean: - 사진 속에 있는 레모네이드들은 지금까지 내가 기억하는 모습과는 많이 다른 분위기였다.

1508700068.english: - Just in case… just in case… a little more…

1508700069.english: - If only I had met them just a little earlier... what would it have been like?
1508700069.korean: - 조금만 더… 일찍 내가 이들과 만났더라면… 어땠을까?

1508700070.english: Could they have made a different choice?
1508700070.korean: - 그들은 다른 선택을 할 수 있었을까?

1508700071.english: - Back to before I walked this incredibly long and arduous path…
1508700071.korean: - 이 너무나도 멀고 긴 길을 걸어오기 이전으로…

1508700072.english: - Perhaps I could have gone back to those days.
1508700072.korean: - 어쩌면 다시 이 시절로 돌아갈 수 있었을지도 모른다.

1508700073.english: Of course, because it is our beautiful memory.

1508700074.english: But memories are just memories. They are merely a passing phase of life. There is no need to dwell in the past forever.
1508700074.korean: 하지만 추억은 그저 추억이다. 스쳐 지나가는 인생의 과정일 뿐.&n언제까지 과거에 머물러 있을 필요는 없지.

1508700075.english: Still… I see… I wonder what it was like for Omega…

1508700076.english: Waaah, Beta~ I really can't stand this anymore~!
1508700076.korean: 흐아아아아앙, 베타~ 이제 저는 정말이지 못해먹겠어요~!

1508700077.english: Kyaaah!? Ah, the barbecue! Ugh... what a waste...

1508700078.english: Um, excuse me... Omega? What on earth is going on?
1508700078.korean: 저, 저기… 오메가? 대체 무슨 일인데 그래요?

1508700079.english: I really don't understand why I have to take orders from people who are dumber than me!
1508700079.korean: 대체 왜 제가 저보다 바보들인 인간들의 명령이나 받들어야 하는 건지 모르겠어요~!

1508700080.english: Ah, I get it, so could you please step back for now...? *Gulp*... There is some amazing food... right over there...
1508700080.korean: 아, 알았으니까 일단 떨어져 주시면 안 될까요…? 꿀꺽… 굉장한 음식들이… 바로 저기에 있는데…

1508700081.english: Hahaha, that's unexpected. To think that the great Omega would turn into such a cute look when drunk.
1508700081.korean: 하하하하, 이거 의외인데? 천하의 그 오메가가 술에 취하면 저런 깜찍한 모습이 될 줄이야.

1508700082.english: Don't just stand there watching, please stop them!

1508700083.english: It's interesting, so let's keep watching a bit longer. If not now, when will we ever get to see Omega like that again?
1508700083.korean: 재미있으니까 좀 더 지켜보자고. 지금 아니면 언제 또 오메가의 저런 모습을 볼 수 있겠어?

1508700084.english: Gamma unnie~! Please encourage me~ I'm really holding it in hard~
1508700084.korean: 감마 언니~! 저 좀 격려해 주세요~ 저 정말로 열심히 참고 있단 말이에요~

1508700085.english: Hahaha, our youngest Omega~ has become such a spoiled brat.
1508700085.korean: 하하하, 우리 막내 오메가~&n완전 어리광쟁이가 됐군.

1508700086.english: Yeah yeah, this Gamma sister will cheer you on with all her might!
1508700086.korean: 그래 그래, 이 감마 언니가 전력으로 격려해 주마!

1508700087.english: Why don't you two over there come over here and dote on the Omega together?
1508700087.korean: 거기 두 사람도 이쪽으로 와서 같이 오메가를 귀여워해 주는 게 어때?

1508700089.english: To be honest, I think it would be better to get some work done rather than wasting time here like this.
1508700089.korean: 솔직히 말해 여기서 이런 식으로 시간을 낭비할 바에는, 조금이라도 더 업무를 처리하는 게 좋지 않을까 생각되는군요.

1508700090.korean: 흥, 누가 일 중독자 아니랄까 봐.

1508700091.english: I don't know what's so great about always being stuck in there.
1508700091.korean: 맨날 그렇게 처박혀 있는 게 뭐가 그렇게 좋다는 건지.

1508700092.english: Why don't you take care of your body like me every once in a while? Then wouldn't you be able to receive the Chairman's favor a little more?
1508700092.korean: 너도 가끔은 나처럼 이렇게 몸을 가꾸는 게 어때?&n그럼 조금이라도 더 회장님의 총애를 받을 수 있지 않겠어?

1508700093.english: Well, I don't see the need for that.

1508700094.english: Actually, since you are frail compared to your other sisters, you might need to work on your body.
1508700094.korean: 하긴, 당신은 다른 자매들에 비해 빈약한 만큼 몸을 가꿀 필요가 있을지도 모르겠네요.

1508700095.english: What? What did you just say? What does that mean?
1508700095.korean: 뭐? 너 지금 뭐라고 했어? 그게 무슨 뜻인데?

1508700097.english: Don't lie! You're subtly touching your swimsuit strap right now to emphasize it!
1508700097.korean: 거짓말하지 마! 지금 은근슬쩍 수영복 끈을 만지면서 강조하고 있잖아!

1508700099.english: Now that the sisters are all together for the first time in a while, are you just going to fight?
1508700099.korean: 모처럼 자매들이 다 같이 모였는데 싸우기만 할 건가요?

1508700100.english: Haa... I kind of expected it to turn out like this...
1508700100.korean: 하아… 안 그래도 이렇게 될 것 같았는데…

1508700101.english: By the way, didn't Epsilon come? That kid hasn't shown his face even once.
1508700101.korean: 그나저나 엡실론은 안 왔나요? 그 아이는 얼굴을 한 번 안 비추는군요.

1508700102.english: If it were me… I’d be here…

1508700103.english: Ep, Epsilon? Why is Epsilon's voice coming from the security Pupp Head?
1508700103.korean: 엡, 엡실론? 어째서 경비용 펍 헤드에서 엡실론의 목소리가?

1508700104.english: I was too lazy to go... so since it's a lemonade gathering, I'll just count this as an attendance for now...
1508700104.korean: 가기 귀찮았으니까… 레모네이드 모임이라고 해서 일단은 이렇게 참석이라는 걸로…

1508700105.english: Yawn~ Well then, I'm tired from playing games all night for days, so I'm going to bed now…
1508700105.korean: 후아암~ 그럼 난 며칠째 밤새 게임해서 피곤하니까 이만 잘게…

1508700106.english: I have to take over from Yerena after getting even a little sleep...
1508700106.korean: 조금이라도 잔 다음에 예레나랑 교대해 주지 않으면 안 되거든…

1508700111.english: Gamma… you’re the organizer of this gathering, aren’t you?

1508700112.english: So what? What on earth is the reason you called us all together like this?
1508700112.korean: 그래서? 대체 뭐 때문에 이렇게 우리들을 불러 모은 거죠?

1508700113.english: It probably isn't just about having a social gathering.
1508700113.korean: 단순히 친목회를 하자는 건 아닐 테고.

1508700114.english: Huh? That's right. Of course, it's to bond with all of us Lemonade Sisters.
1508700114.korean: 응? 그거 맞아.&n당연히 우리 레모네이드 자매 모두와 친목을 다지기 위함이지.

1508700115.english: You know that saying, "Even if they are sworn enemies, if the ship they are on is sinking, they will move as one body"?
1508700115.korean: 오월동주라고 서로 원수 같은 사이인 녀석들이라도, 같이 타고 있는 배가 가라앉는다면 한 몸처럼 움직인다는 말이 있잖아?

1508700117.english: I was curious to see if that would actually happen, so I thought I’d give it a try.
1508700117.korean: 실제로 그렇게 되나 궁금해서 한 번 해볼까 했지.

1508700119.english: Haha, that's right. I just came back after making a hole in my stomach.
1508700119.korean: 하하, 맞아. 조금 전에 배에 구멍을 내고 왔지.

1508700120.english: Are you out of your mind!? We're right in the middle of the ocean!!

1508700121.english: Well, won't it work out somehow?

1508700122.english: Oh? It looks like the ship is starting to tilt.
1508700122.korean: 오? 슬슬 배가 기울기 시작하는 것 같은데?

1508700123.english: Everyone! Hurry and escape the ship! There's a rescue boat at the back!!
1508700123.korean: 모두! 어서 배에서 탈출해요! 뒤쪽에 구조 보트가 있어요!!

1508700124.english: That's why I said it was a waste of time...

1508700125.english: Zeta! Where are you going! I'm not finished talking yet!
1508700125.korean: 제타! 어디 가! 아직 내 얘기 안 끝났어!

1508700127.english: Hoee? What the... My body is shaking so much...

1508700128.english: Ahhh, the food... I haven't even finished eating yet...
1508700128.korean: 아아아, 음식이… 아직 다 먹지 못했는데…

1508700131.english: Gamma! Don't laugh, you move too!
1508700131.korean: 감마! 웃지 말고 당신도 어서 움직여요!

1508700134.english: It must have been a good memory for Omega as well.

1508700135.english: I suddenly noticed that the handkerchief was still wrapped around my right hand.
1508700135.korean: - 나는 문득 오른손에 여전히 손수건이 감겨 있다는 걸 눈치챘다.

1508700136.english: It is the handkerchief I tied for Omega when he hurt his hand a while ago, and the handkerchief Omega tied for me when I hurt my hand.
1508700136.korean: - 일전에 오메가가 손을 다쳤을 때 내가 매어준 손수건이자,&n내가 손을 다쳤을 때 오메가가 매어준 손수건이다.

1508700137.english: I unrolled the handkerchief and took it to the grave.
1508700137.korean: - 나는 감긴 손수건을 풀어 무덤 앞으로 가지고 갔다.

1508700138.english: He suddenly stopped as he placed it down in front of the grave.
1508700138.korean: - 무덤 앞에 내려다 놓으면서 문득 멈춰 섰다.

1508700139.english: That's too much... You said you'd make sure I wouldn't have any lingering regrets...

1508700140.english: At this rate... there’s absolutely no way I can’t have lingering feelings...
1508700140.korean: - 이래서는 도저히... 미련이 남지 않을 수가 없잖아…

1508700141.english: Just like you said, I'm a foolishly kind person.
1508700141.korean: - 네 말대로 나는 바보같이 상냥한 사람이야.

1508700142.english: So I won't throw it away; I'll keep it forever.
1508700142.korean: - 그러니까 버리지 않을 게, 언제까지나 간직하겠어.

1508700143.english: I picked up the handkerchief I was about to put down.

1508700144.english: It was just a supply handkerchief with the Orca mark on it, but now it was different.
1508700144.korean: - 그저 오르카 마크가 새겨진 보급 손수건일 뿐이지만 지금은 달랐다.

1508700145.english: Right next to the Orca mark engraved on the back of the handkerchief, a black butterfly was engraved.
1508700145.korean: - 그 손수건 뒷면에 새겨진 오르카 마크 바로 옆에는, 한 마리의 검은 나비가 새겨져 있었다.

1508700148.english: Wait, I'll get it out soon!

1508700152.english: Do you think I saved you just to do that?
1508700152.korean: 내가 그러려고 너를 구한 줄 알아?

1508700153.english: I didn't overcome all those hardships just to give up over something like this!
1508700153.korean: 난 고작 이런 일로 포기하려고 지금까지 그 역경들을 넘어온 게 아니야!

1508700156.english: Gamma… I heard it from Dragon.

1508700157.english: Thank you for coming to help everyone.

1508700158.english: I thought it would be better than nothing, so I made it myself.
1508700158.korean: 없는 것보단 나을 것 같아서. 내가 직접 만들어 봤어.

1508700159.english: They left smiling. With a relaxed face.

1508700161.english: It must have been a good memory.

1508800001.english: I visited the iron workshop again to finish the last remaining task.
1508800001.korean: - 나는 마지막 남은 일을 해결하기 위해 다시 철의 공방을 찾았다.

1508800002.english: Hey, I get how you feel, but aren't you rushing things a bit?
1508800002.korean: 이봐, 기분은 알겠지만 너무 서두르는 거 아니야?

1508800003.english: It's actually unreasonable to tell me not to rush...

1508800004.english: I am swelling with anticipation that surpasses even the day of a massive update for my favorite game…
1508800004.korean: 제일 좋아했던 게임의 대규모 업데이트 당일을 뛰어넘는 기대감으로 부풀어 있어…

1508800005.english: You seem to connect everything to that side...

1508800006.english: - According to the recapture team, they succeeded in safely recovering Epsilon's body, but since they had already completely lost control of the body, Epsilon was unable to interfere.
1508800006.korean: - 탈환조의 말에 의하면 무사히 엡실론의 몸을 되찾는 데는 성공했지만, 이미 몸의 제어권을 완전히 빼앗긴 뒤였기에 엡실론이 간섭할 수 없는 상태였다고 한다.

1508800007.english: After that, we received a report that, thanks to the time and effort of Orca's experts including Alpha and Azaz, Epsilon was in a condition to regain his body.
1508800007.korean: - 그 뒤로 알파와 아자즈 등 오르카의 전문가들이 시간을 들여 고생한 결과, 엡실론이 몸을 되찾을 수 있는 상태가 되었다는 보고를 받았다.

1508800008.english: I'm sorry, Commander, for bothering you when you must be busy with other things.
1508800008.korean: 미안해 사령관, 다른 일로 바쁠 텐데 신경 쓰게 해서.

1508800009.english: Of course, since we're partners who even went on a wild chase together.
1508800009.korean: 당연하지, 같이 광란의 질주까지 함께 한 파트너니까.

1508800010.english: What do you mean by a wild chase… Ugh, bad memories… And I’m not your partner…
1508800010.korean: 뭐가 광란의 질주야… 윽, 안 좋은 기억이… 그리고 난 네 파트너가 아니라고…

1508800011.english: Well, so what? It's better to just get along.
1508800011.korean: 뭐, 어때 좋은 게 좋은 거지.

1508800014.english: Actually, it’s not like there’s a twist where it turns out you’re the mastermind and the final boss, right?
1508800014.korean: 사실 알고 보니 네가 흑막이었고 최종 보스라거나 그런 반전이 있는 건 아니지?

1508800016.english: You know how that happens often in games. The guy you thought was a new comrade who joined midway turns out to be the mastermind.
1508800016.korean: 그 왜 게임 같은 곳에서 흔하잖아.&n중간에 합류한 동료인 줄 알았던 녀석이 사실은 흑막이었고

1508800017.english: I mean, the kind of thing where the true final boss appears after orchestrating everything.
1508800017.korean: 모든 일을 꾸민 진정한 최종 보스로 등장하는 그런 거 말이야.

1508800018.english: Shepherd, I know exactly how you see me…
1508800018.korean: 셰퍼드 네가 날 어떻게 보고 있는지 잘 알겠어…

1508800019.english: No matter how much I love games, me as the final boss... there's probably no game more boring than that...
1508800019.korean: 내가 아무리 게임을 좋아한다지만, 내가 최종 보스라니… 그것만큼 재미없는 게임은 없을 걸…

1508800022.english: A short while later, we arrived at the central control room where Epsilon's body was located.
1508800022.korean: - 잠시 후, 우리는 엡실론의 몸이 있는 중앙제어실에 도착했다.

1508800024.english: It was a bit complicated, but somehow I was able to handle the systems that were tied to Epsilon.
1508800024.korean: 좀 복잡하긴 했지만, 어떻게든 엡실론에게 묶여있던 시스템들을 처리할 수 있었어요.

1508800025.english: Yes, now her body is free.

1508800026.english: I nodded to Epsilon, who was watching.
1508800026.korean: - 나는 지켜보고 있던 엡실론에게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1508800027.english: A bioroid sleeping peacefully with its eyes closed.
1508800027.korean: - 조용히 눈을 감고 잠들어 있는 바이오로이드.

1508800028.english: He looked like a character straight out of a fairy tale.
1508800028.korean: - 그 모습은 마치 동화 속에 나올 법한 주인공 같았다.

1508800029.english: - Epsilon led the AGS body toward his real body.
1508800029.korean: - 엡실론은 AGS의 몸을 이끌고 자신의 진짜 몸으로 다가갔다.

1508800031.english: I'm sorry for making you wait so long.

1508800032.english: It's been tough being alone all this time, hasn't it? Thank you so much for holding on until now.
1508800032.korean: 줄곧 혼자서 힘들었지? 지금까지 버텨줘서 정말 고마워.

1508800033.english: Because I will never fall now…

1508800035.english: With those words, Pupp Head lowered his head and stopped moving.
1508800035.korean: - 그 말을 끝으로 펍 헤드의 몸이 고개를 떨구고 움직임을 멈췄다.

1508800036.english: - The image of a beautiful doll sleeping quietly and peacefully.
1508800036.korean: - 조용하게, 편히 잠들어 있는 아름다운 인형의 모습.

1508800037.english: - And the fairy tale protagonist who seems like they will be asleep forever…
1508800037.korean: - 그리고 언제까지나 잠들어 있을 것 같은 동화 속 주인공은…

1508800038.english: He slowly opened his eyes as if the spell had been broken.
1508800038.korean: - 마치 마법이 풀린 것처럼 천천히 그 눈을 떴다.

1508800039.english: A face squinting as if blinded by the light, perhaps because it had been a long sleep.
1508800039.korean: - 오랫동안 잠들어 있었기 때문인지 눈이 부신 듯 찡그리는 얼굴.

1508800040.english: Then, as if he has spotted me, he looks this way.

1508800043.english: Thanks to you… I came back to life…!

1508800044.english: Hahaha, just kidding. How about that? Surprised?

1508800045.english: D, C, B, B, C, up, down, up, down…
1508800045.korean: D, C, B, B, C, 위, 아래, 위, 아래…

1508800046.english: Down, diagonal, front, down, diagonal, front, all buttons…
1508800046.korean: 아래, 대각, 앞, 아래, 대각, 앞, 모든 버튼…

1508800048.english: Thanks to you, I was able to have a good time.

1508800051.english: Hmm, should I introduce it again?

1508800053.english: You'll play games with me again, right?

1508800054.english: Woohoohoo, I'm going to suck up all those points, so just wait...
1508800054.korean: 우후후후, 그 점수들 쪼옥 빨아먹을 테니까 기다리고 있어…

1508800055.english: No way, I never go easy on you when it comes to games…
1508800055.korean: 안 돼, 게임에 있어서는 절대 봐주지 않거든…

1508800056.english: Because that is my game strategy.

1508800058.english: I look forward to more fun games in the future.

1508800059.english: With this, a long, long journey has finally come to an end.
1508800059.korean: - 이걸로 길고 길었던 하나의 여정이 마침내 끝이 났다.

1508800060.english: While there were those who newly joined, there were also those who could not.
1508800060.korean: - 새롭게 합류한 자들이 있는 한편, 그러지 못한 자들도 있었다.

1508800061.english: It feels as if I have been running steadily forward solely to get back what I had lost for a long time.
1508800061.korean: - 마치 오랫동안 잃어버린 것들을 돌려받기 위해서 오로지 앞을 향해 한결같이 달려온 기분이다.

1508800062.english: I'd like to rest a little now, but I guess I can't...
1508800062.korean: - 이제는 조금 쉬고 싶지만 그럴 수는 없겠지…

1508800063.english: We have walked a very long way so far. However, there is still a long way to go.
1508800063.korean: - 지금까지 아주 긴 길을 걸어왔다. 그러나 가야 하는 길은 아직 많이 남아 있다.

1508800064.english: - A long journey where we all went through many things together… It was truly a long and enjoyable journey in many ways.
1508800064.korean: - 모두가 함께하며 많은 일들이 있었던 긴 여정… 정말, 여러 의미로 즐겁고도 긴 여정이었다.

1508800067.english: It's okay. Besides, Epsilon regaining his body is important to me too.
1508800067.korean: 괜찮아. 그리고 엡실론이 몸을 되찾는 건 나에게도 중요한 일이니까.

1508800068.english: Anyway, it looks like the two of you are very close.
1508800068.korean: 그건 그렇고 둘이 아주 친한 모양이네.

1508800072.english: Uh... you bastard... you tricked me...?

1508800074.english: What are the conditions for the appearance of the hidden character Armand in Orca & Fighter?
1508800074.korean: 오르카 앤 파이터의 히든 캐릭터 아르망의 출현 조건은?

1508800075.english: What is the command for Brownie's Super Special Move in Steel Line Fighter VI?
1508800075.korean: 스틸라인 파이터 Ⅵ 브라우니의 초필살기 커맨드는?

1508800076.english: It looks like it really is Epsilon.
1508800076.korean: 아무래도 진짜 엡실론이 맞는 것 같네.

1508800077.english: Yeah, I'll take you on anytime.

1508900001.english: How about it? Can you open it like you did back then?

1508900003.english: If the security system isn't much different from when we broke in before, we might be able to open it... but please don't get your hopes up too high.
1508900003.korean: 보안 시스템이 전에 침입했을 때랑 크게 다르지 않다면 열 수 있겠지만… 큰 기대는 하지 말아줘.

1508900004.english: Since we broke in once... they must have set up some additional security system.
1508900004.korean: 우리가 한 번 침입했었으니까… 아무래도 뭔가 추가적인 보안 시스템을 구축해 놓았겠지.

1508900005.english: It took quite a while back then too, so if it takes too long, I'd rather use another method...
1508900005.korean: 그때도 제법 시간이 걸렸는데, 너무 오래 걸린다면 차라리 다른 방법을…

1508900008.english: What? How did this happen? It's much faster than back then!
1508900008.korean: 뭐야, 어떻게 된 거야? 그때보다 훨씬 빠르잖아?

1508900009.english: Could it be that you've actually been hiding your power all this time, or that you're unleashing your true power one last time?
1508900009.korean: 혹시 지금까지 사실 힘을 숨겨두었다거나, 마지막으로 진심 발휘한다거나 그런 거야?

1508900010.english: I'm sorry to interrupt your expectations, but the security system was just open...
1508900010.korean: 기대하고 있는 와중에 미안하지만, 그냥 보안 시스템이 열려있었던 것뿐이야…

1508900012.english: I don't really know that either... All I know is that there are traces of it being forcibly opened by someone.
1508900012.korean: 그건 나도 잘 모르겠어… 알 수 있는 건 누군가에 의해 강제로 열린 흔적이 있다는 거야.

1508900013.english: Maybe there are other guests besides us...
1508900013.korean: 어쩌면은 우리 말고도 선객이 있는 걸지도…

1508900015.english: Whatever it was, isn't it a good thing that it was open?
1508900015.korean: 뭐가 됐든 간에 열려있었다면 좋은 거 아니야?

1508900016.english: It means you can enter comfortably without any trouble.
1508900016.korean: 고생하지 않고 편하게 들어갈 수 있다는 뜻이잖아.

1508900017.english: Babonir, don't you understand? That a door that should be closed is open.
1508900017.korean: 바보니르, 모르겠냐? 닫혀 있어야 할 문이 열려있다는 건

1508900018.english: It means there might be someone who went ahead of us.
1508900018.korean: 우리보다 먼저 앞서간 사람이 있을지도 모른다는 거잖아.

1508900019.english: Someone who went before? Who is that?

1508900023.english: Huh? Hey, you don't know either!

1508900025.english: Our mission is to find and reclaim Epsilon's main body, which is somewhere.
1508900025.korean: 우리의 임무는 어딘가에 있는 엡실론의 본체를 찾아 탈환하는 거다.

1508900026.english: Even if there really are others who have invaded this place besides us, it has nothing to do with us.
1508900026.korean: 만일 정말로 우리 말고도 이곳에 침입한 자가 있다 한들 우리와는 관계없다.

1508900027.english: But English Shepherd, you are the leader in this operation.
1508900027.korean: 하지만 잉글리쉬 셰퍼드, 이번 작전에서는 네가 리더다.

1508900028.english: I will follow your judgment. What are you going to do?
1508900028.korean: 네 판단을 따르겠다. 어떻게 할 거지?

1508900031.english: Where on earth is it… If I don’t hurry a little more…
1508900031.korean: 대체 어디에… 좀 더 서두르지 않으면…

1508900038.english: Ahhhhh... What on earth have I done...

1508900039.english: You're not even a combatant, yet you sneaked in here trying to figure out what to do on your own.
1508900039.korean: 전투원도 아니면서 혼자 뭘 어떻게 해보겠다고 여기까지 숨어 들어온 거야.

1508900040.english: was just planning to gather information and try to contact Mr. Shepherd somehow...
1508900040.korean: 정보만 수집해서 셰퍼드 씨에게 어떻게든 연락해 볼 생각이었는데…

1508900041.english: Even if I try to go out again, I can't get out because I'm blocked by a barrier that suddenly appeared...
1508900041.korean: 다시 나가려고 해도 갑자기 나타난 방벽 때문에 가로막혀 나갈 수도 없고…

1508900043.english: Calm down, Yumi. The situation is terrible, but it doesn't hinder your ability to move.
1508900043.korean: 진정해, 유미.&n상황은 최악이지만 움직이는 데 지장이 있는 건 아니야.

1508900044.english: Fortunately, there aren't as many guards or watchful eyes as you might think.
1508900044.korean: 다행히 경비나 감시의 눈도 생각보다 많지는 않아.

1508900045.english: If the anomaly is this large in scale, Mr. Shepard or the Last Human must have noticed and started taking action.
1508900045.korean: 이 정도로 규모가 큰 이변이라면 분명 셰퍼드 씨나 마지막 인간님이 눈치채고 행동을 시작했을 거야.

1508900046.english: So, you just need to find a safe place and hide until then.
1508900046.korean: 그러니까 어디 안전한 장소를 찾아서 그때까지 몸을 숨기면 돼.

1508900051.english: There's a limit to how much a plot hole can break. How did I end up going from being a captured princess to the one rescuing her?
1508900051.korean: 설정 붕괴에도 정도가 있지, 내가 어쩌다가 붙잡힌 공주에서 구하는 입장이 된 거야.

1508900052.english: Anyway, I'm just going to do as much as I can.
1508900052.korean: 아무튼, 할 수 있는 데까지만 해보는 거야.

1508900053.english: As Omega said... I might have changed a lot too.
1508900053.korean: 오메가 님이 말씀하신 대로… 저도 많이 달라졌을지도 모르겠네요.

1508900054.english: Then let's hurry to the next location…

1508900056.english: Huh!? Why are the goblins here? They definitely passed by!?
1508900056.korean: 앗!? 고블린들이 어째서? 분명 지나쳐서 갔을 텐데!?

1508900061.english: Okay, it looks like you aren't hurt.

1508900062.english: We can talk about that later. Let's take care of those guys first!
1508900062.korean: 얘기는 나중이야 우선 저 녀석들부터 처리하자고!

1508900063.english: Since I’m with specialists in this field!

1509000002.english: Is anyone hurt by any chance?

1509000003.english: Would anyone really get hurt by something as trivial as this?
1509000003.korean: 고작 이런 거로 다치는 녀석이 있겠어?

1509000006.english: Huh? Battery, why are you standing there in such an awkward position? And why are you covering your butt?
1509000006.korean: 응? 배터리 너 왜 그런 엉거주춤한 자세로 서 있어?&n엉덩이는 왜 가리고?

1509000007.english: W-what are you talking about! Sometimes I stand in this position!
1509000007.korean: 무, 무슨 소리야! 이런 자세로 서 있을 때도 있어!

1509000008.english: You're kidding me. Come here. It's obvious you're hiding something!
1509000008.korean: 웃기시네, 일로 와바.&n딱 봐도 너 뭔가 숨기고 있잖아!

1509000014.english: Hey hey hey, this is amazing. You come over here and take a look!
1509000014.korean: 야야야, 대박이야. 너도 일로 와서 한 번 봐봐!

1509000015.english: What on earth is going on…

1509000017.english: … Heck… Hahahaha! Babonir! Kekekeke! What are you!

1509000019.english: Don't laugh! It's just a brush!

1509000020.english: So that's what happened~ That's why you became a monkey's butt~

1509000021.english: Don't call it a monkey's butt!

1509000022.english: From now on, I guess I should call it a monkey instead of a battery~
1509000022.korean: 이제부터는 배터리가 아니라 원숭이라 불러야겠는 걸~

1509000024.english: Vargr, you come and check it out too. It's really funny.
1509000024.korean: 바르그, 너도 와서 봐봐 되게 웃겨.

1509000025.english: ... It's fine as long as you weren't seriously injured.

1509000026.english: ... How should I put it? They seem like people without any tension.

1509000029.english: I came to save you, Yumi!

1509000030.english: … It feels like you're trying to wrap things up in a hurry.

1509000031.english: That can't be true. I've been searching for you all this time to save you.
1509000031.korean: 그럴 리가 있나. 내가 널 구하려고 여태껏 얼마나 찾아다녔는데.

1509000032.english: I know. Thank you for coming to save me.

1509000033.english: So, Yumi, why on earth are you in a place like this?
1509000033.korean: 그래서, 유미 너는 대체 왜 이런 곳에 있는 거야?

1509000035.english: Are you saying you came all the way here alone to find the Omega captured by Zeta?
1509000035.korean: 제타에게 붙잡힌 오메가를 찾으려고 혼자서 여기까지 왔단 말이야?

1509000037.english: Just like a true Elvens fan… you’re really tenacious…
1509000037.korean: 누가 엘븐즈 팬 아니랄까 봐… 정말 독종이네…

1509000038.english: Anyway, I'm glad Mr. Shepherd and the last human came.
1509000038.korean: 아무튼, 셰퍼드 씨와 마지막 인간님이 와주셔서 다행이에요.

1509000039.english: It's a bit shocking that Zeta was plotting something like that, but...
1509000039.korean: 제타님이 그런 일을 꾸미고 있었다는 건 좀 충격이지만…

1509000040.english: I'm sorry to interrupt, but I think we should move now...
1509000040.korean: 이야기 중에 미안하지만, 이젠 움직이는 게 좋을 것 같아…

1509000041.english: There's no benefit to staying here for too long...
1509000041.korean: 여기에 오래 있어서 좋을 건 없으니까…

1509000042.english: Okay, let's move to a different spot for now. Yumi, you're definitely coming along, right?
1509000042.korean: 그래 일단 자리를 옮기자.&n유미 너도 당연히 따라올 거지?

1509000043.english: Yes, because I might end up going to where Omega is.
1509000043.korean: 네, 어쩌면 오메가 님이 계신 곳에 가게 될 지도 모르니까요.

1509000044.english: Did you say your name was Yumi...? I have something to ask you...
1509000044.korean: 유미라고 했나…? 너한테는 물어볼 게 있어…

1509000045.english: Um, so... Epsilon? Yes, what could it be?
1509000045.korean: 저 그러니까… 엡실론 님?&n네, 어떤 걸까요?

1509000046.english: It looks like you managed to bypass the security to get here. How did you do it? It wouldn't have been easy to break in without any equipment...
1509000046.korean: 네가 여기까지 들어오는 보안을 뚫은 것 같은데 어떻게 한 거야?&n아무런 장비도 없이 뚫기란 간단하지 않았을 텐데…

1509000047.english: No matter how you say it was... I can only say that I just figured out the system structure myself and opened it...
1509000047.korean: 어떻게라고 말씀하셔도… 그냥 직접 시스템 구조를 파악해서 열었다고밖에는…

1509000048.english: I have built countless similar security systems so far.
1509000048.korean: 비슷한 보안 시스템을 지금까지 수도 없이 만들어 봤거든요.

1509000050.english: See? I told you so, didn't I? Abracadabra, open sesame!
1509000050.korean: 어때? 내 말이 맞지? 수리수리 마수리 열려라 참깨라니까?

1509100002.english: This is where Epsilon's body is trapped.

1509100004.english: Is that person over there Mr. Epsilon?

1509100005.english: This time, I will definitely get my body back…
1509100005.korean: 이번에는 반드시 내 몸을 되찾을 거야…

1509100007.english: Is it a diversionary tactic to break through head-on to draw in the enemy's main force, and then infiltrate elite units elsewhere?
1509100007.korean: 정면으로 돌파하여 적의 주력 부대를 끌어들이게 하고, 다른 곳으로 정예 부대를 침투시키는 양동 작전인가요.

1509100009.english: It's good to see you again.

1509100010.english: I am not glad to see you.

1509100011.english: I've felt this before, but I'm talking about you.

1509100014.english: Damn it, he's being so blunt... I have nothing to say... I just can't win this argument.
1509100014.korean: 젠장, 딱 잘라 말하잖아... 할 말이 없네… 말로는 도무지 못 이기겠다.

1509100015.english: expect you will refuse, but I will tell you for now.

1509100016.english: I hope you will lay down your weapons and surrender quietly.

1509100017.english: What happens if we surrender? Is the order to capture the intruder like last time?
1509100017.korean: 항복하면 어떻게 되는데? 그때처럼 침입자를 붙잡으라는 명령이야?

1509100018.english: No. This time, I received orders to eliminate the intruder.
1509100018.korean: 아니요. 이번에는 침입자를 제거하라는 명령을 받았습니다.

1509100019.english: Therefore, you will be executed immediately upon surrender.

1509100021.korean: 고통스럽지 않게 끝내 드릴 수 있습니다.

1509100023.english: But this time, the situation is a bit different from back then.
1509100023.korean: 하지만 이번에는 그때랑 좀 상황이 다르거든.

1509100024.english: I think I should actually advise you to surrender.
1509100024.korean: 오히려 너에게 항복을 권해야 한다고 생각되는데?

1509100025.english: Identified new intruder figures: 1 non-combatant Bioroid, 4 combatant bio-androids.
1509100025.korean: 새로운 침입자 인물을 식별&n비전투원 바이오로이드 1명, 전투원 바이오로이드 4명.

1509100026.english: Lemonade Omega's lieutenant Yumi confirmed as a member of Empressis Hound.
1509100026.korean: 레모네이드 오메가의 부관 유미, 엠프레시스 하운드 멤버로 확인.

1509100028.english: Decision... Unfavorable with a 42.7% win rate...

1509100029.english: Is that the kind of win rate you get against this member...
1509100029.korean: 이 멤버를 상대로 그 정도 승률이 나오는 거냐…

1509100031.english: My duty is to defend this place. I will refuse the recommendation to surrender.
1509100031.korean: 저의 임무는 이곳을 지키는 것입니다.&n항복 권고는 거절하겠습니다.

1509100032.english: It's no use regretting it later!

1509200001.english: Ugh, they said the win rate was 42.7%, and it looks like it's true.
1509200001.korean: 윽, 승률이 42.7% 라더니 아무래도 진짜인가 보네.

1509200003.english: Approaching by breaking through those flames spewing from its entire body is practically an act of suicide.
1509200003.korean: 온몸에서 뿜어져 나오는 저 화염을 뚫고 접근하는 건 그야말로 자살행위니까요.

1509200004.english: English Shepherd, if we just drag this out, we will be at a disadvantage.
1509200004.korean: 잉글리쉬 셰퍼드, 이대로 시간만 끌리면 이쪽이 불리하다.

1509200005.english: I will somehow create an opening.

1509200006.english: In the meantime, you guys reclaim Epsilon's body.
1509200006.korean: 그 사이에 너희들은 엡실론의 몸을 탈환해라.

1509200007.english: What? You're not thinking of jumping into those flames, are you?
1509200007.korean: 뭐? 너 설마, 저 화염 속으로 뛰어들 생각인 거야?

1509200008.english: There is no other way. At least I have the highest chance of surviving among them.
1509200008.korean: 다른 방법이 없다.&n그나마 내가 이 중에서 가장 살아남을 확률이 높다.

1509200009.english: Our mission given by the Master is strictly to reclaim Epsilon's body.
1509200009.korean: 주인님이 내리신 우리의 임무는 어디까지나 엡실론의 몸을 탈환하는 거다.

1509200011.english: Why are you taking this so seriously? It just means we can find a gap and take it out, right?
1509200011.korean: 뭘 그리 심각해? 그냥 틈만 만들어서 빼 오면 된다는 거잖아?

1509200012.english: In that case, we can just use our trump card.
1509200012.korean: 그거라면 우리의 비장의 무기를 쓰면 되지.

1509200013.english: Secret weapon? What does that mean?

1509200014.english: Ah, Vargr, you wouldn't know since you've never been on a mission with us in the past, right?
1509200014.korean: 아, 바르그 넌 과거에 우리랑 임무를 나간 적이 없으니 모르겠구나?

1509200015.english: I'm telling you, our Empress Hound has a secret weapon.
1509200015.korean: 우리 엠프레시스 하운드에는 비장의 무기가 있단 말씀.

1509200017.english: Why did you call me! Can't you see I'm busy right now!? Ow, that's hot!
1509200017.korean: 왜 불러! 지금 바쁜 거 안 보여!? 앗 뜨거~!

1509200019.english: … What do you mean by that?

1509200020.korean: 니가 지금 생각하고 있는 그거 맞아.

1509200021.english: What!? I clearly told you I wouldn't do it like last time this time!
1509200021.korean: 뭐어!? 내가 분명 이번에는 그때처럼 안 한다고 말했잖아!

1509200022.english: I'm sorry, Babonir, but I have to do this. If you don't, we're all ruined.
1509200022.korean: 바보니르 미안하지만 해야겠다.&n니가 안 하면 우리 다 망해.

1509200024.english: Wait a moment, something is wrong with Epsilon's main unit!
1509200024.korean: 잠시만요, 엡실론 님의 본체 쪽 상태가 이상해요!

1509200026.english: The suppression of the AI inside Kestos Himas has been completed.
1509200026.korean: 케스토스 히마스에 들어있던 AI의 제압이 완료되었습니다.

1509200027.english: With this, we can completely control epsilon's kestos himas.
1509200027.korean: 이걸로 엡실론의 케스토스 히마스는 완전히 우리가 제어할 수 있습니다.

1509200028.english: Mother will achieve her goal soon.
1509200028.korean: 이제 곧 어머니께서 목적을 이루실 겁니다.

1509200029.english: Before that... I guess I'll have to get rid of the AI that was getting in the way.

1509200032.english: Battery! What are you doing! I said do that quickly!

1509200035.english: Hey hey! He's trying to do it! Everyone, if you don't want to get roasted alive, stay away from Fafnir!
1509200035.korean: 야야! 쟤 하려고 한다! 다들 통구이 되기 싫으면 파프니르에게서 떨어져!

1509200036.english: I don't know what will happen!

1509300002.english: I never imagined it would cause a discharge emitting energy over a wide area…
1509300002.korean: 설마, 광범위로 에너지를 내뿜는 방전을 일으킬 줄은…

1509300004.english: Still, since we succeeded in defending Kestos Himas... pursuit should be unnecessary.
1509300004.korean: 그래도 케스토스 히마스는 지키는 데 성공했으니… 추격은 불필요하겠지요.

1509300005.english: However… due to the discharge a little while ago, there is a problem with the energy being sent underground.
1509300005.korean: 하지만… 조금 전의 방전으로 지하로 보내지던 에너지에 문제가 생겼습니다.

1509300006.english: Perhaps there might be a problem with your mother as well.

1509300007.english: Is this… the Empress Hound's trump card you guys talked about?
1509300007.korean: 이게… 너희들이 말한 엠프레시스 하운드의 비장의 무기인가?

1509300008.english: Right~ It's perfect to use in a do-or-die situation or when you need to escape, isn't it?
1509300008.korean: 그렇지~ 이판사판 상황이나 탈출할 때 쓰면 아주 제격이지?

1509300009.english: I escaped using this method when I went to Oughigia before, too.
1509300009.korean: 예전에 오귀기아에 갔을 때도 이 방법으로 탈출했거든.

1509300010.english: On the other hand, if you use this, Babonir won't be able to move for a while and will really turn into an idiot... but damn, this thing is surprisingly heavy?
1509300010.korean: 대신 이걸 사용하면 바보니르는 당분간 움직일 수 없게 되고 정말로 바보가 되어버리지만…&n젠장, 이 녀석 의외로 무겁네?

1509300012.english: It's gold! Gold is the best!

1509300014.english: I think I know why Fafnir was so reluctant to do it.
1509300014.korean: 파프니르가 왜 그렇게 하기 싫어했는지 알 것 같군.

1509300015.english: Anyway, thanks to you, I survived. We also safely recaptured Epsilon.

1509300016.english: How about it, Epsilon? Can you return to your original body?
1509300016.korean: 엡실론 어때? 원래 몸으로 돌아갈 수 있겠어?

1509300017.english: It's impossible... I've completely lost access rights.
1509300017.korean: 무리야… 완전히 접근할 수 있는 권한을 잃었어.

1509300018.english: To return to my original body, I must regain my authority.
1509300018.korean: 원래 몸으로 돌아가기 위해서는 다시 권한을 되찾아야 해.

1509300019.english: Is this all I can do...

1509300020.english: The goal of regaining Epsilon's body has been achieved.

1509300021.english: It is difficult to move forward in our current state.
1509300021.korean: 우리의 현재 상태로는 더 이상 움직이기 힘들어.

1509300022.english: I will aim for everyone to return safely just like this.
1509300022.korean: 이대로 모두 무사히 복귀하는 걸 목표로 할게.

1509300023.english: Yumi, I'm sorry, but is that okay?

1509300028.english: The commander is a cool guy overflowing with masculinity right now.
1509300028.korean: 사령관은 지금 남성미 넘치는 멋진 남자거든.

1509400001.english: (Is the current situation neither good nor bad…)

1509400002.english: (Several hours have passed since the Lord entered the Iron Workshop, but so far there have been no significant changes.)
1509400002.korean: (주군이 철의 공방 내부로 진입하고 몇 시간이 지났지만, 지금까지 이렇다 할 큰 변화는 없다.)

1509400003.english: (The last report received was only that they headed to the underground where Zeta is.)
1509400003.korean: (마지막으로 받은 보고로는 제타가 있는 지하로 향했다는 내용뿐.)

1509400004.english: My Lord, please return safely... Everyone is waiting for you...
1509400004.korean: 주군, 부디 무사히 돌아오시길… 모두가 기다리고 있소…

1509400005.english: I will prepare to block the enemy's next attack! We must defend this place at all costs!
1509400005.korean: 적들의 다음 공격을 막을 준비를 하겠소!&n반드시 이곳을 사수해야 하오!

1509400006.english: What? I came all this way only to find out it's a defensive strategy? Why don't we just all go out and wipe them all out?
1509400006.korean: 뭐야? 기껏 와봤는데 지키는 작전인 건가? 그러지 말고 그냥 다 같이 나가서 전부 쓸어버리는 게 어때?

1509400010.english: Why are you here? Shouldn't you be on the northern front?
1509400010.korean: 그대가 왜 여기 있는 거요?&n북부 전선에 있어야 하지 않소?

1509400011.english: This is too much, Dragon. I'm a member of Orca now?
1509400011.korean: 이거 너무한 걸 용, 나도 이제 오르카의 일원이라고?

1509400012.english: With everyone fighting like this, I couldn't just sit around doing nothing, could I? Of course I came to help!
1509400012.korean: 모두가 이렇게 싸우는데 나만 손 놓고 있을 수는 없지 않겠어?&n당연히 도와주러 왔지!

1509400013.english: … So you're saying he wanted to fight too in the end?

1509400016.english: Join Orca and fight against a greater enemy. I told you that if you stay here, battles that satisfy me will keep happening, whether you like it or not.
1509400016.korean: 오르카에 합류하여 더 큰 적과 맞서 싸우라고. 이곳에 있으면 싫어도 내가 만족하는 싸움이 계속해서 일어날 거라고 말이야.

1509400017.english: That's definitely true. I still can't get over the excitement.
1509400017.korean: 확실히 그 말대로야.&n난 지금 흥분이 가시지 않아.

1509400018.english: So, it shouldn't matter if I run wild, right?

1509400019.english: Phew... Do as you please. I entrust the guerrilla warfare to you.
1509400019.korean: 후우… 마음대로 하시오. 그대에게는 유격을 부탁하겠소.

1509400020.english: Good, that's how it should turn out!

1509400022.english: You're late! Rhode, hurry up and get ready! It's time to sortie! Poseidon's unit will now charge into the heart of the battlefield and wipe out the enemy!
1509400022.korean: 늦었구나! 로데, 어서 준비해라 출전이다!&n포세이돈 부대는 이제부터 전장 한 가운데 들어가 적들을 쓸어버린다!

1509400023.english: What!? So suddenly as soon as you arrived?

1509400025.english: Oh, what is it, kid? Are you dissatisfied?

1509400026.english: Of course. Please consider our position sometimes, having to put up with your unreasonable demands, Gamma.
1509400026.korean: 그야 당연하죠.&n가끔은 감마 님의 억지를 받아주는 저희 입장도 생각해 주세요.

1509400027.english: If you have any complaints, why don't you stay out of it, Merope?
1509400027.korean: 불만이 있다면 메로페 너는 빠지는 게 어때?

1509400028.english: I, the 'current adjutant,' will handle the Captain's battle preparations. So, could the 'former adjutant' please step aside for a bit?
1509400028.korean: 대장님의 전투 준비는 '현 부관'인 내가 맡을 테니까.&n그러니 '전 부관'은 어디로 좀 빠~져 있어 주겠어?

1509400031.english: Rhode? What are you doing? Why aren't you getting ready to compete?
1509400031.korean: 로데? 뭘 하고 있죠? 어서 출전 준비를 하지 않고?

1509400033.english: We absolutely cannot back down from this fight.
1509400033.korean: 이 싸움 절대 물러설 수 없습니다.

1509400034.english: Ms. Merope? What kind of fight are you talking about? Your eyes are scary…
1509400034.korean: 메로페 님? 어떤 싸움을 말씀하시는 거예요? 눈이 무서워요…

1509400035.english: Hahaha! Good! That's what makes you a member of Poseidon Industries!
1509400035.korean: 하하하! 좋아! 그래야 포세이돈 인더스트리의 대원이지!

1509400036.english: Now, everyone follow me! Let's smash them all to pieces!
1509400036.korean: 자, 모두 날 따라와라! 모조리 박살 내자고!

1509500003.english: It looks like you've been tricked.

1509500004.english: In that case, carrying out the assigned mission is meaningless.
1509500004.korean: 그렇다면 더 이상 부여 받은 임무를 수행은 무의미 합니다.

1509500005.english: crisis response manual based on the current situation has not been entered either.
1509500005.korean: 현재 상황에 따른 위기 대응 매뉴얼도 입력된 바 없습니다.

1509500007.english: Always choosing the best course of action for one's mother.
1509500007.korean: 항상 어머니를 위한 최선의 행동을 선택하는 것.

1509500008.english: In that case, the next thing I need to do is…
1509500008.korean: 그렇다면 다음으로 제가 해야 하는 행동은…

1509500009.english: I will retrieve the data code and move on.

1509500011.english: It was nice meeting you, Orca members.

1509500012.english: I hope the day comes when we meet again.

1510000001.english: Ugh... how am I going to face people tomorrow with this hot pack on my face...?
1510000001.korean: 하 씨… 내일부터 핫팩 얼굴 어떻게 보고 다니냐…

1510000002.english: Alpha seems like they're going to scold me a lot.
1510000002.korean: 야. 어제부터 숙소에 박혀서 아무 말도 안 하고. 뭔 일 있어?

1510000003.english: This older sister has something to think about, that's why. Don't worry about it.
1510000003.korean: 이 언니가 생각할 일이 있어서 그래. 신경 꺼.

1510000004.english: Bullshit. Who said I'm your older sister? Did he get shot in the head or something?
1510000004.korean: 지랄. 누가 언니래? 대가리에 총이라도 맞았나.

1510000005.english: Aunt JangHwa, why won't you come with me to look at clothes? Why did you suddenly change course?
1510000005.korean: 장화 이모~ 같이 옷 보러 가자니까? 왜 갑자기 다른 길로 새?

1510000006.english: Alpha? Weren't you on vacation? Come in...
1510000006.korean: 야. 내가 그딴 호칭으로 부르지 말랬지.

1510000007.english: Hey, you couldn't say anything the first time I called.
1510000007.korean: 에이, 처음에 불렀을 땐 아무 말도 못했으면서.

1510000008.english: Our Red will be happy to have a nephew!

1510000011.english: But, you, JangHwa. You've really changed a lot.&nBack then, you'd pull the detonator first, regardless of whether I was still in the building or not.
1510000011.korean: 근데, 장화 너. 진짜 많이 변했네. &n옛날엔 내가 건물 빠져 나오든 말든 기폭장치부터 먼저 당겼잖아.

1510000012.english: If you miss it, shall I make it again?

1510000013.english: Then how sad will your niece be? Auntie has become so kind and gentle like this.
1510000013.korean: 그럼 네 조카님께서 얼마나 슬퍼하시겠어? 이모가 이렇게 착하고 순해졌는데.

1510000014.english: Ugh... look at this woman trying to get under my skin.
1510000014.korean: 하… 이년이 성질 긁는 거 봐라?

1510000015.english: But I heard CheonA Big Sis was being cute in front of the commander the day before yesterday? I heard the commander was terrified.
1510000015.korean: 근데 천아 언니 그제 사령관 앞에서 애교 부렸다면서? 사령관이 기겁했다던데?

1510000017.english: That's what happens when you do things that don't suit you. Were you always the type to act cute?
1510000017.korean: 너한테 맞지도 않는 짓거리를 하니 그렇지. 애초부터 네가 애교 떠는 애였냐?

1510000018.english: Looks like they're in a good mood because they finally got a lead after a while?

1510000019.english: CheonA Big Sis, don't be like that. We're going to look at clothes. Do you want to come too, sis?
1510000019.korean: 천아 언니~ 그러지 말고, 옷 보러 갈 건데. 언니도 같이 갈래?

1510000020.english: Huh? Why would I go there?

1510000021.english: Hihing, Sis. You did it because you also wanted to look good to the Commander, didn't you?  &nMmhm… I know him better than you since I met him first~
1510000021.korean: 히힝, 언니. 언니도 사실 사령관한테 잘 보이고 싶은 마음에 그랬던 거 아냐? &n으흠… 난 언니보다 먼저 사령관을 만나서 잘 아는데~

1510000023.english: Auntie, sister! How about this? Does it suit me?
1510000023.korean: 이모, 언니! 이거 어때? 나한테 어울려?

1510000024.english: Damn it, don't link arms with me.
1510000024.korean: 아씨, 진짜 나한테 팔짱 끼지 마.

1510000025.english: Miho, that would suit you. Red, aren't you buying any new clothes?
1510000025.korean: 미호 너한테 어울리긴 하겠네. 빨강이 너는 따로 옷 안 사?

1510000026.english: ...Okay. It's just taking up space in the closet anyway. I can't even be bothered to clean up.

1510000027.english: Aunt, try this on. That outfit is perfect for your aunt. How is it?
1510000027.korean: 이모, 이거 입어 봐. 이모한테 딱 어울리는 옷이야. 어때?

1510000028.english: Do you think that would suit me?

1510000029.english: Huh? Why doesn't this outfit suit me? When I worked at my aunt's cafe, I'd even wear cat ear headbands and go meow... uh-oh?!
1510000029.korean: 응? 이 옷이 왜 안 어울려? 이모 카페에서 알바할 땐 아예 고양이 귀 머리띠하고 야옹~ 하잖…으브븝?!

1510000031.english: Thinking about it, I think the hot pack would really like that, right? Sometimes, I think a neat sweater with jeans would be nice too.
1510000031.korean: 생각해보니 핫팩이 꽤 좋아할 거 같은데? 가끔은 이런 단정한 스웨터에 청바지도 괜찮을 것 같네.

1510000032.english: Isn't it unusual? It's a bit less revealing... she's a bit more like her older sister...
1510000032.korean: 평범하지 않아? 노출도 좀 적고… 걔는 좀 더 언니 만큼…

1510000033.english: Auntie, you should show a different side of yourself beside just being revealing, then the commander will like you even more.
1510000033.korean: 이모도 노출만 하지 말고 다른 모습을 보여줘야 사령관이 더 좋아하지.

1510000034.english: ...Hmm, come to think of it, that's true. Really?

1510000035.english: It's better than just wearing a gloomy jacket with a bomb in it.
1510000035.korean: 음침하게 폭탄 든 자켓만 입고 다니는 것보단 낫지.

1510000036.english: You're the one who's always walking around in a white puffer jacket with just a hand warmer. Don't try to be cute when it doesn't suit you, just change your clothes.
1510000036.korean: 너야말로 흰색 패딩에 핫팩만 끼고 다니잖아. 괜히 안 어울리는 애교 부리지 말고 옷이나 바꿔.

1510000037.english: Anyone would think I wear this outfit all the time...
1510000037.korean: 누가 보면 맨날 이 옷만 입고 다니는 줄 알겠…

1510000038.english: Honestly, hasn't that been the same outfit since I first saw CheonA Big Sis?
1510000038.korean: 솔직히, 천아 언니 처음 봤을 때부터 지금까지 저 옷 아니었어?

1510000040.english: I got hit with a fact bomb.

1510000041.english: Alcyone, would you like to go visit your sisters? You should say hello.
1510000041.korean: 야, 나도 그래서 좀 바꾸려고 하잖아! 이래 봬도 원피스나 드레스 같은 거 생각하고 있다고!

1510000043.english: But, in my opinion, I think CheonA Unnie would look better in clothes that suit her image rather than those flashy ones.
1510000043.korean: 근데, 내가 볼 땐 천아 언니는 저런 화려한 옷보단 언니 이미지에 맞는 옷이 더 좋을 거 같은데?

1510000045.english: You're good at tripping people up, so why are you trying to do things that don't suit you?
1510000045.korean: 자빠뜨리는 건 잘하면서 왜 안 어울리는 거만 하려고 그래.

1510000046.english: Oh, how about this? Auntie. This suits CheonA Big Sis really well, doesn't it?
1510000046.korean: 아, 이거 어때? 이모. 이거 천아 언니한테 잘 어울리지~ 그렇지?

1510000048.english: Make sure to soothe Alcyone's heart.
1510000048.korean: 야, 이건… 진짜 이게 나랑 어울린다고 생각하냐?

1510000049.english: Or maybe she'd wear a dress and just keep talking with a lisp. Oh, maybe my pronunciation is off because my tongue was split from the beginning.
1510000049.korean: 아니면 원피스 입고 혀 짧은 소리만 계속 내던가. 아, 애초부터 혀가 갈라져서 발음이 새려나.

1510000050.english: Auntie, really, even if you say... hmm, in my opinion, this suits you much better, sis.
1510000050.korean: 이모는 진짜 말을 해도… 흐흠, 내가 보기엔 언니는 이게 훨씬 더 어울릴 것 같아.

1510000051.english: Hmm... it's a bit flashy, isn't it? I wonder if the hand warmer will still see me as a woman even if I wear something like this?
1510000051.korean: 으음… 좀 요란한 것 같기도 하고… 뭐랄까, 이런걸 입어도 핫팩은 날 여자로 봐줄까?

1510000052.english: You were cursing from the moment we first met, so what's with the cute act now? If you have a head, use it to think.
1510000052.korean: 처음 만났을 때부터 욕 박아버렸으면서 무슨 귀여운 척이야. 머리가 있으면 생각을 해라.

1510000054.english: CheonA Big Sis. How about you try it on once? I think the commander will like it.
1510000054.korean: 천아 언니. 일단 한 번 입어보는 거 어때? 사령관이 좋아할 거 같은데.

1510000057.english: That girl is really overdoing it.

1510000058.english: Come to think of it, it is really strange that CheonA is acting like that. I always thot you were so relaxed.
1510000058.korean: 그러고보니 천아 언니가 저러는 거 진짜 이상하긴 해. 맨날 여유 넘치는 줄 알았는데.

1510000059.english: Even tho she's a woman, she wants to prepare for her first date. You put me thru hell.
1510000059.korean: 꼴에 자기도 여자라, 첫 데이트 준비하고 싶은 거고. 나한테 별 지랄은 다했으면서.

1510000060.english: Auntie, you seem to have changed a lot.
1510000060.korean: 이모 진짜 많이 바뀐 거 같아.

1510000061.english: What are you going to say again?

1510000062.english: At first, when the team members called you "Auntie," you got really angry, didn't you?
1510000062.korean: 처음에 이모~ 라고 팀원들이 불렀을 땐 노발대발했잖아.

1510000063.english: It's so cheesy... Don't include me in that family game.
1510000063.korean: 오글거리잖아… 그 가족놀이에 날 끼진 말라고.

1510000064.english: Even tho my aunt's expressions are blunt, I like that I can feel she cares a lot about CheonA.
1510000064.korean: 이모가 쓰는 표현은 퉁명스러워도, 천아 언니 많이 신경 써주는 게 느껴져서 좋은 거 같아.

1510000065.english: Stop it, stop the bullshit. It's really cringeworthy.

1510000070.english: That's a very you outfit. It suits you.

1510000071.english: That's all the praise you can give?

1510000072.english: Sister. That's really good, isn't it? You're the first person I've seen pull off this kind of vibe in casual clothes, CheonA Big Sis...
1510000072.korean: 언니. 진짜 괜찮은데? 나 사복으로 이런 느낌 내는 건 천아 언니가 처음이야…

1510000073.english: Doesn't it look a bit off? It feels a bit off, and it doesn't seem particularly special...
1510000073.korean: 좀 그렇지 않아 보여? 튀는 느낌에다가 크게 특별해 보이지도 않고...

1510000076.english: If you got into Orca your way, then act like it.
1510000076.korean: 네 방식대로 오르카에 들어왔으면 네 스타일대로 행동해.

1510000080.english: How's the front tail condition? Didn't I say I love lying on gold the most?
1510000080.korean: 야~ 어이가 없네, 빨강이. 네가 언제부터 내 신경 써줬다고...

1510000081.english: Should I just stop caring forever?

1510000082.english: ... No, thank you. I'll listen to you today.

1520000001.english: - When I finished all my work for the day, I pulled up my chair and took a deep breath.
1520000001.korean: - 오늘치 업무가 모두 끝나자, 의자를 끌어당기고 숨을 크게 내쉬었다.

1520000002.english: - That's a shame, I wonder if there's more work to be done? As I was clicking around the panel, I heard a knock.
1520000002.korean: - 아쉽다, 뭔가 더 일이 있지 않을까? 패널을 이리저리 클릭하던 그때 노크 소리가 들렸다.

1520000004.english: - The member who opened the door and entered was CheonA.
1520000004.korean: - 문을 열고 들어 온 대원은 천아였다.

1520000005.english: - However, the atmosphere was completely different from the usual CheonA.
1520000005.korean: - 하지만 평소의 천아와는 확연히 분위기가 달라졌다.

1520000006.english: Why are you staring so intently?

1520000008.english: It wasn't strange. Rather, it fits CheonA perfectly, looking as if it were the clothes he was originally wearing.
1520000008.korean: - 이상한 건 아니었다. 오히려 천아와 딱 맞는 옷이라 원래 입고 있던 옷처럼 꼭 어울린다.

1520000009.english: If you have some free time, would you like to go shopping with me for a bit?
1520000009.korean: 시간 남으면 나랑, 잠깐 쇼핑이라도 갈래?

1520000010.english: I heard there's a sale at the Saman branch today... Can you help me with some shopping?
1520000010.korean: 오늘 삼안 영업소에서 세일한다는데... 같이 쇼핑하는 거 좀 도와 줘.

1520000011.english: - On the surface, it seems like they're asking for help with shopping, but it's probably a request to go on a date with themselves for a little while.
1520000011.korean: - 표면적으로는 쇼핑을 도와달라 말하는 거겠지만, 아마도 잠깐 자신과 데이트를 해달라는 요구 같다.

1520000012.english: - Since I have some time to spare anyway, and I've never spent time alone with CheonA, I came out with him to clear my head.
1520000012.korean: - 어차피 시간도 남고, 천아와 단 둘이 시간을 보낸 적은 없으니 머리를 비울 겸 같이 나왔다.

1520000013.english: Can you push the hand warmer and the cart?

1520000014.english: - CheonA suddenly pushed a cart over, hopped right in, and stuck out her tongue.&nReluctantly, I pushed the cart that CheonA was in and wandered around the sales office.
1520000014.korean: - 천아는 대뜸 카트를 밀고 오더니 별안간 덜렁, 그 안에 타곤 혀를 내밀었다.&n하는 수 없이 천아가 탄 카트를 밀며 영업소 여기저기를 어슬렁 돌아다녔다.

1520000015.english: Hot packs, those over there are on sale, grab some quickly. Huh?
1520000015.korean: 핫팩, 저기 저거 세일한다 얼른 담아. 응?

1520000016.english: I borrowed it from here and there. I bought this outfit too, borrowing a can of tuna from Battery.
1520000016.korean: 여기저기서 빌렸지. 이 옷도 배터리한테 참치캔 빌려서 산 거고.

1520000017.english: - I should ask Fafnir later if he got shaken down by CheonA...
1520000017.korean: - 나중에 파프니르에게 천아한테서 삥을 뜯기진 않았는지 물어봐야겠다…

1520000018.english: Come here, hot pack. This one seems good too. Right?
1520000018.korean: 이리 와봐, 핫팩. 이거도 괜찮은 거 같아. 그렇지?

1520000019.english: - CheonA sat in the cart, pointing at various things and wearing an excited expression.&nAs I was pulling the cart around like that, CheonA looked up at me and said,
1520000019.korean: - 천아는 카트 안에 앉아 이것 저것 가리키며 신나는 표정을 지었다. &n그렇게 카트를 끌고다니던 중 천아가 나를 올려다보며 말했다.

1520000020.english: Surely Orca is better now than before~ eating whatever she wants like this.
1520000020.korean: 확실히 옛날보단 지금 오르카가 낫네~ 이렇게 먹고 싶은 거 많이 먹고.

1520000021.english: After the Empress passed away... things were really tough. I'm just staring blankly, not knowing what to do right now.
1520000021.korean: 여제님 돌아가시고 나선… 엄청 이것저것 힘들었거든. 당장 뭘 해야 할지 멍때리기만 하고.

1520000022.english: I heard there's a rumor about the last human... Honestly, even tho I've only done dirty work, I hesitated a lot about whether they'd accept me so easily.
1520000022.korean: 마지막 인간이 있단 소문을 들었는데… 솔직히 지저분한 일만 했는데도 순순히 받아줄까 고민 많이 했었다?

1520000023.english: If I start talking... I could talk all day and not finish. I'll tell you about it slowly, one by one, when I have more time later.
1520000023.korean: 아마 이야기 하면… 종일 이야기 해도 끝나지 않을 거야. 나중에 시간이 나면 천천히 하나하나 얘기해줄게.

1520000024.english: If we're going to talk about before humanity was destroyed, it'll take ages... There was even a time I got help from JangHwa-nyeon...
1520000024.korean: 인류 멸망 전 이야기 하려면 한 세월이야… 장화년한테 한 번 도움 받았던 일도 있었고…

1520000025.english: There was even a time I fought for my life before the apocalypse against the android who was my genetic master... I almost died.
1520000025.korean: 내 유전자 주인이었던 바이오로이드랑 멸망 전 목숨을 걸고 싸운 일도 있었지… 정말 죽을 뻔했었다고.

1520000026.english: Yeah... anyway, a lot has happened. Before I met hot packs, that is.
1520000026.korean: 응… 하여튼 많은 일이 있었어. 핫팩 만나기 전까진 말이야.

1520000027.english: - CheonA closed his eyes as if recalling a long-forgotten memory.&nLooking around, I soon stopped in front of a sign that read "Hot Pack Mass Sale," and CheonA gave me a thumbs up.
1520000027.korean: -천아는 오랜 기억을 더듬는 듯 눈을 감았다. &n주변을 둘러보다 이내, 핫팩 대량 세일이란 문구 앞에 멈춰서자 천아가 엄지를 치켜 세운다.

1520000028.english: Oh, a hand warmer! You really know what I want, don't you?
1520000028.korean: 오, 핫팩~ 내가 원하는 걸 쏙쏙 캐치하네?

1520000029.english: You're smart, as expected. Okay, okay... After all, how long have I known you? Heh heh... Have I been too consistent?
1520000029.korean: 역시 똑똑해. 좋아 좋아… 하긴 내가 너랑 지낸 세월이 얼만큼인데. 후훗… 내가 너무 한결 같았나?

1520000030.english: - The children of the Empress Hound all changed after joining.&nVargr, and JangHwa, and Fafnir...
1520000030.korean: - 엠프레시스 하운드의 아이들은 하나 같이 합류하고 나서 변해갔다. &n바르그도, 그리고 장화도, 파프니르도…

1520000031.english: - But Chun-ah is always the same. They treat you like a friend, without formality, and often joke around.
1520000031.korean: - 하지만 천아 만큼은 늘 한결 같다. 친구처럼 격없이 대하고, 장난도 곧잘 잘 친다.

1520000032.english: - I've never once felt that CheonA's personality was bad. Should I say it's rather comfortable?&nUnlike the other members, being with CheonA makes me feel much more comfortable and carefree.
1520000032.korean: - 천아의 성격을 나쁘게 느낀 적은 단 한 번도 없다. 오히려 편하다고 해야 할까? &n일반 대원들과 달리, 천아와 함께 있으면 한결 마음이 편하고 홀가분해진다.

1520000033.english: In a way, am I being treated like a friend...?
1520000033.korean: 어떻게 보면 친구… 처럼 여겨지고 있는 건가?

1520000034.english: I won't deny it. Honestly... I've only been teasing you all this time, haven't I? I acknowledge that. Okay...
1520000034.korean: 부정은 안 할게. 솔직히… 여태껏 널 골려먹기만 했잖아? 인정 인정. 그래…

1520000035.english: Okay, so you know me really well, right? Because you're definitely different from the other kids.
1520000035.korean: 그래, 그러니까 날 너무 잘 아는 거겠지. 다른 애들이랑은 확실히 다르니까.

1520000036.english: But you know... I think you still don't know me very well.&nEven tho I say things like that... the truth is, I really want you, and I want you to see me as a special girl, at least for you.
1520000036.korean: 근데 말이야… 넌 날 아직 너무 모르는 것 같아. &n말은 이렇게 해도… 나 사실, 너 엄청 원하고, 너에게만큼은 특별한 여자애로 보이고 싶단 말이야.

1520000037.english: Yeah, at first, I just hugged you because you were warm.&nMy kind and warm last hot pack... Warmer than anything else... My hot pack.
1520000037.korean: 그래, 처음에는 그저 네가 따뜻해서 안겼을 뿐이야. &n착하고… 따뜻한 내 마지막 핫팩… 그 어느 것보다 따뜻한… 내 핫팩.

1520000038.english: But now, disposable hand warmers for keeping my body temperature up are too common. Is what I really want just a hot pack?
1520000038.korean: 근데, 이젠 내 체온 유지를 위한 일회용 핫팩은 너무 흔해. 내가 진짜 원하는 게 단순히 뜨거운 핫팩 같아?

1520000039.english: - While shopping, CheonA stopped the cart she was pushing and grumbled, looking up at me.
1520000039.korean: - 장을 보던 천아는 밀던 카트를 멈추게 하더니 나를 올려다보며 투덜거렸다.

1520000040.english: It's great that the hand warmers are on sale, but... Now that I'm actually trying to buy it, it feels a bit cheap.
1520000040.korean: 핫팩이 세일이라서 좋긴 한데... 막상 사려니까 좀 짜치네.

1520000041.english: - In response to my question, CheonA took a step closer, then stood right in front of me.
1520000041.korean: - 내 질문에 천아는 한 걸음 더 다가가, 이내 내 앞에 바짝 붙어 섰다.

1520000042.english: How long do I have to be satisfied with these shoddy mass-produced goods?
1520000042.korean: 내가 언제까지 이런 덜떨어진 공산품에 만족해야 해?

1520000043.english: Even if I said I'd live like a snake god from a folktale...
1520000043.korean: 내가 아무리 설화 속 뱀신처럼 살겠다고 했어도…

1520000044.english: Aren't you neglecting me for too long?
1520000044.korean: 날 너무 오랫동안 방치하는 건 아니냐고!

1520000045.english: - CheonA threw a bundle of hand warmers into the cart with a nervous gesture and then opened her mouth.
1520000045.korean: - 천아는 핫팩 묶음을 신경질적으로 카트에 던져둔 뒤 입을 열었다.

1520000046.english: You know, I... I'm not as cheerful as the Horizon kids, and I'm not as obedient as that little puppy either...
1520000046.korean: 난 말이야. 호라이즌 애들처럼 성격 해맑지도 않고, 그 똥강아지처럼 고분고분한 년도 아냐…

1520000047.english: - Come to think of it, the Empress Hound unit itself was created for terrorism, wasn't it...?&nBecause CheonA is so cheerful, I had completely forgotten what these children used to do.
1520000047.korean: - 그러고보니 엠프레시스 하운드 자체가 테러를 위해 만들어진 부대였지…?&n천아가 너무 밝기만 하다보니 원래 이 아이들이 무슨 일을 했었는지 까맣게 잊고 있었다.

1520000048.english: Oh man... living life, I never thot I'd be taking advice from that boot-licking bitch.
1520000048.korean: 아 씨… 살다 보니 내가 장화 년 조언을 들을 일도 오네.

1520000049.english: - After grumbling like that, CheonA, who was now nestled in my arms, continued speaking in a whisper.
1520000049.korean: - 그렇게 투덜거린 천아는 꼭 내 품에 안긴 뒤, 이내 품 안에서 속삭이듯 말을 이어갔다.

1520000050.english: Now, instead of being my hand warmer, be my boyfriend.
1520000050.korean: 이제 내 핫팩 하지 말고 내 남친하자.

1520000051.english: Instead of these cold-weather gear, I really want to snuggle with my hot pack... no, my boyfriend.
1520000051.korean: 이런 방한 도구 말고, 내 핫팩… 아니, 내 남친한테 꼭 안기고 싶어.

1520000052.english: - Then I finally understood why CheonA had suggested spending time with me today.
1520000052.korean: - 그제야 나는 어째서 천아가 오늘 나와 시간을 보내자 이야기를 했는지 알 것 같았다.

1520000053.english: - On the outside, she seems strong and cheerful, but deep down, she's still a gentle woman, like a soft shoe.
1520000053.korean: - 겉으론 강하고 쾌활한 성격으로 보이지만, 그 속은 역시 장화와 같은 여린 여자.

1520000054.english: - As I hugged CheonA tightly, she stood on tiptoe, cupped her cheeks with her hands, and said,
1520000054.korean: - 그렇게 천아를 꼭 안아주자, 그녀는 까치발을 들어 두 볼을 손으로 감싸며 말했다.

1520000055.english: Boyfriend, are you letting me cross the line first today, just for a change?
1520000055.korean: 남친, 오늘은 특별히 내가 먼저 선 넘어주는 거야?

1520000056.english: - And then, CheonA turned his head and pressed his lips against mine.&nBoldly, her soft tongue pushed its way into my mouth.
1520000056.korean: - 그리고 천아는 고개를 틀어 내 입술에 자신의 입술을 포갰다. &n대담하게, 그녀의 말캉한 혀가 내 입 안을 비집고 들어왔다.

1520000057.english: - Finally, when he parted his lips, a blush bloomed on CheonA's white cheeks.
1520000057.korean: - 이윽고 입술을 뗐을 땐 천아의 하얀 볼에 홍조가 피어올랐다.

1520000058.english: Oh, this song... I used to hear it a lot when I worked part-time at the cafe in Horizon.
1520000058.korean: 어, 이 노래… 호라이즌에서 카페 알바 할 때 많이 들었는데.

1520000059.english: They said it was a song sung by human singers before the apocalypse... I actually liked it more than I expected and hummed it a lot.
1520000059.korean: 멸망 전 인간 가수들이 부른 노래라고 하더라… 생각보다 취향이라서 많이 흥얼거렸어.

1520000060.english: I thot we got along well, so we went to a karaoke place and sang a lot.
1520000060.korean: 나랑 잘 맞는 것 같아서 장화랑 노래방 가서도 많이 불러봤고.

1520000061.english: - CheonA soon looked at me intently, smiled, and said,
1520000061.korean: - 천아는 이내 나를 지긋이 바라보다 미소지으며 말했다.

1520000062.english: I want to let you hear it too. Want to listen?

1520000063.english: - As CheonA confessed her true feelings, she hopped off the cart and continued singing, pretending to hold a microphone in her hand.
1520000063.korean: - 자신의 진심을 고백하던 천아는 카트에서 훌쩍 내린 뒤, 손으로 마이크를 쥐는 시늉을 하며 노래를 이어갔다.

1520000064.english: - Although it wasn't a formal stage and not a beautiful ballad song... it was a song filled with Chun-ah's sincerity...
1520000064.korean: - 비록 정식 무대는 아니었고, 아름다운 발라드 곡도 아니었지만… 천아만의 진심을 담은 노래…

1520000065.english: - As if her life had been full of ups and downs, CheonA's voice, flowing to the strong melody, was sweet yet strong.
1520000065.korean: - 말 그대로 파란만장했다던 삶이었다는 듯, 강한 선율에 흘리는 천아의 목소리는 달콤하면서도 단단했다.

1520000066.english: - As the song ended, CheonA approached me and hugged me tightly.
1520000066.korean: - 그렇게 노래가 끝나자, 천아는 내게 다가와 꼭 안겼다.

1520000067.english: Doesn't it seem a bit out of place for me to be singing this kind of song...?
1520000067.korean: 내가 이런 노래 부르는 거 별로 안 어울리지...?

1520000069.english: JangHwa said, "Are you singing a moodless song in front of a hot pack... I mean, your boyfriend?"
1520000069.korean: 장화가 그러더라, 무드 없는 노래를 핫팩… 아니 남친 앞에서 부르냐고.

1520000070.english: - CheonA closed her eyes for a moment, as if lost in thought, then slowly opened them again. And then, he smiled.
1520000070.korean: - 천아는 잠시 생각에 잠기듯 눈을 감다, 이내 천천히 떴다. 그리고 이내 미소를 지었다.

1520000072.english: Right? Haha, okay. You like this version of me better, right?
1520000072.korean: 그렇지? 하하, 그래. 역시 이런 내가 더 좋지?

1520000073.english: - I hugged CheonA tightly. It seemed as if he wouldn't let go of even my back, constantly stroking and groping it.
1520000073.korean: - 나는 천아를 꼭 끌어안아주었다. 천아도 놓지 않으려는 듯 내 등을 연신 쓸며 더듬었다.

1520000074.english: Warm... like the first time... like then...

1520000075.english: I'm so glad, boyfriend... that I met you.

1520000076.english: - After finishing his answer, CheonA took my hand and smiled brightly.
1520000076.korean: - 천아는 대답을 마친 뒤, 내 손을 잡고 해맑게 웃었다.

1520000077.english: Hey, did you hear the time sale broadcast just now? I want to buy a lot of things, let's go quickly. Huh? They're having a flash sale soon. Huh?
1520000077.korean: 남친, 지금 타임 세일 방송 들었어? 나 사고 싶은 거 많은데 얼른 가자. 응? 곧 타임세일한데. 응?

1520000078.english: - Instead of answering, I put CheonA in the cart and pushed it hard toward the corner she wanted to go to.
1520000078.korean: - 나는 대답 대신 천아를 카트에 태운 후 그녀가 가자는 코너로 카트를 세게 밀었다.

1520000079.english: Hey, what do you think of this, babe? Do you think this underwear would suit me?
1520000079.korean: 남친, 이거 어때? 이 속옷 나한테 어울릴 거 같아?

1520000080.english: Hey, what's "I don't know"? Your boyfriend, even tho you've touched him all night, he doesn't know?
1520000080.korean: 에이 글쎄가 뭐야! 남친, 밤새 만져본 적도 있으면서 모르는 거야?

1520000081.english: - When I answered smoothly, CheonA frowned, then put her underwear directly into the cart, stood up abruptly, and glared at me.
1520000081.korean: -능청스럽게 대답하자, 천아는 미간을 좁히더니, 그대로 속옷을 카트 안에 넣곤 벌떡 일어서 나를 째려봤다.

1520000083.english: Ugh, I can't believe it. Boyfriend? Anyone would think you have an incredibly clean boyfriend, wouldn't they? No... is your memory like a goldfish?
1520000083.korean: 하~ 어이가 없네, 남친? 누가 보면 엄~ 청 깨끗한 남친인 줄 알겠어? 아니… 기억력이 붕어인가?

1520000084.english: - Saying that, CheonA then pointed to the changing room.
1520000084.korean: - 천아는 그렇게 말하더니, 이내 탈의실을 손가락으로 가리켰다.

1520000085.english: Then let's go over there and check again. This time, check it thoroughly, okay?
1520000085.korean: 그럼 저기 가서 다시 확인해보자고. 이번에는 철저하게 확인해, 알았지?

1520000086.english: - After saying that, CheonA grabbed my collar and pushed me straight into the changing room.&nThen, with a grin, he stuck out his tongue.
1520000086.korean: - 천아는 그렇게 말한 뒤, 내 옷깃을 잡고 그대로 탈의실 안에 밀어넣었다. &n그리곤 씩 웃으며 혀를 날름거렸다.

1520000087.english: Sun said he'd let it slide just for today, so remember that well. Okay?
1520000087.korean: 선은 오늘만 먼저 넘어준다 했으니까… 손에 잘 기억해 둬. 알았지?

1520000088.english: - Instead, I locked the dressing room door at the provocative gesture of CheonA.
1520000088.korean: - 나는 오히려 나를 도발하는 천아의 몸짓에 나는 탈의실의 문을 걸어 잠갔다.

1520000089.english: And then, after a very long time had passed, it was when they emerged, exhausted, carrying CheonA on their back.
1520000089.korean: 그렇게 아주 긴 시간이 지나고, 기진맥진한 천아를 업고 나온 그때였다.

1520000091.english: This is a supply depot... not a secret room.
1520000091.korean: 여기는 물자 영업소지… 비밀의 방이 아니에요.

1520000092.english: I've managed to make up a story for the other crew members, but...
1520000092.korean: 대충 다른 대원 분들께는 둘러대긴 했지만…

1520000093.english: If you do that again, you'll be banned from entering...?
1520000093.korean: 앞으로 그러시면 출입 금지 시킬 겁니다…?

1520000094.english: -Fatima's stern voice finally made CheonA and me apologize and leave.
1520000094.korean: -파티마의 엄한 목소리에 결국 천아와 나는 사과를 하고 나왔다.

1520000096.english: Hhhing… our boyfriend is so bold, isn't he?

1520000097.english: - CheonA hugged me tightly, but not so tightly that it choked me. The cloth hanging behind my back quietly opened its mouth.
1520000097.korean: - 천아는 내 목을 조이지 않을 정도로 끌어안았다. 내 등 뒤에 매달린 천아는 조용히 입을 열었다.

1520000098.english: Boyfriend. You know, I have a dream...
1520000098.korean: 남친. 나 말이야… 꿈이 하나 있는 거 알아?

1520000099.english: ...It's a bit childish, but I dream of singing on stage someday. If the opportunity arises... should we bring our kids along too?
1520000099.korean: …조금 유치하긴 하지만, 언젠가 무대에서 노래 부르는 꿈. 기회가 된다면… 우리 애들도 같이 끌고?

1520000100.english: - Come to think of it, the song CheonA was singing earlier was also a rock-style song. Perhaps they want to be in a band?
1520000100.korean: - 그러고 보니 천아가 아까 불렀던 노래도 락 스타일의 노래였다. 아마도 밴드를 하고 싶은 걸까?

1520000102.english: Hhhing~ you've gotten pretty good at flattery, boyfriend? That's right… I only told Baekah before, you're the second I've told.
1520000102.korean: 흐흥~ 제법 아부가 늘었어 남친? 맞아… 백아한테만 말했던 건데, 너한테 말하는 게 두 번째야.

1520000103.english: You know, when I was out on my own for a while, I heard rumors about you doing great things.
1520000103.korean: 나 말이야, 한참 혼자 밖에 있었을 때, 네가 활약하던 얘기 소문으로 들었어.

1520000104.english: I don't even know what I'm going to do. Do I have to fight against the Iron Worms?&nOr should I join the Orca Resistance?
1520000104.korean: 난 내가 뭘 할지도 모르겠는데. 철충이랑 대항해서 싸워야 하나? &n아님 오르카 저항군에 들어가야 하나?

1520000105.english: I was so lost and didn't know what to do, so I even watched them secretly. But seeing the kids happy...
1520000105.korean: 진짜 뭘 해야 할지 몰라서 멍해져서 몰래 지켜보기도 했는데 애들이 행복해하는 모습을 보니까…

1520000106.english: I was envious. So you swallowed your pride and came to see me?
1520000106.korean: 부럽더라. 그래서 얼굴에 철판 좀 깔고 너한테 찾아간 거다?

1520000107.english: It was a bit surprising that someone so clueless was the last human. Unlike other humans, I can't be cruel...
1520000107.korean: 저렇게 맹한 애가 마지막 인간이라는 게 좀 의외더라고. 다른 인간들이랑 다르게 모질지도 못하고…

1520000108.english: Right now, he's my most cherished boyfriend. Calm down.
1520000108.korean: 지금은 내가 제일 아끼는 남친이잖아. 화 풀어~

1520000109.english: - Saying that, CheonA pulled me into a hug, as if he would never let go again, and kissed my cheek.
1520000109.korean: - 그렇게 말한 천아는 다신 놓지 않겠다는 듯 내 목을 끌어안곤 볼에 뽀뽀했다.

1520000110.english: My boyfriend, thank you for loving me even tho I'm so selfish. I love my boyfriend a lot too♥
1520000110.korean: 남친, 이렇게 제멋대로인 나도 사랑해줘서 고마워. 나도 남친 많이 사랑해♥

1520000111.english: - Turning my head at the surprisingly affectionate tone of CheonA's voice, which I could hardly believe, I saw him smiling happily at me.
1520000111.korean: - 천아의 말이라곤 믿을 수 없을 정도로 살가운 어투에 고개를 돌리자, 천아는 나를 보며 행복한 미소를 짓고 있었다.

1520000112.english: - Originally, I was planning to take CheonA back to the lodging, but I decided to enjoy this time a bit more, indulging in CheonA's cuteness as she bounced her feet while being carried on my back.
1520000112.korean: -원래라면 숙소에 천아를 데려다 줄 계획이었지만, 내 등에 업힌 채 발을 동동 구르는 천아의 애교를 더 받아주며 이 시간을 즐기기로 했다.

1520000117.english: Are there a lot of tuna cans these days?

1520000120.english: There was more going on than I thought, huh?

1520000122.english: Of course. Isn't this the bare minimum?

1520000125.english: What do you mean, "lame"? What do you mean by that?

1520000126.english: I'm hearing this song for the first time.

1520000128.english: It was a perfect song for Chun-ah, it suited her well.
