1520000131.english: You're lovely both now and as you were at first.

1520000134.english: Well... um... didn't you say before that you wouldn't give permission?
1520000134.korean: 뭐… 으음… 허락은 안 해준다고 전에도 그러지 않았나?

1520000141.english: No. It suited you well when you were singing earlier too.
1520000141.korean: 아니. 아까 노래 불렀을 때도 잘 어울렸어.

1520000142.english: So, it's practically the first one, right?

1530000001.english: Master, I've come to get the documents approved on behalf of Alpha-nee-san.
1530000001.korean: 주인님, 알파 언니를 대신해서 서류 결재받으러 왔어요.

1530000002.english: - One day, shortly after the Caracas business had just wrapped up, Beta opened the door to the commander's office and entered.
1530000002.korean: - 이제 막 카라카스 일이 마무리된 이후의 어느 날, 사령관실 문을 열고 베타가 들어왔다.

1530000003.english: - Recently, instead of giving Alpha a vacation, I decided to have Beta adapt to her work.&nAfter carefully reading the documents Beta had brought, I gave him a thumbs up instead of answering.
1530000003.korean: - 최근 알파에게 휴가를 내준 대신, 베타에게 그녀의 업무를 적응시켜보기로 했다.&n베타가 가져온 서류를 찬찬히 읽어 본 나는 대답 대신 엄지를 치켜들었다.

1530000004.english: Are you okay? This is the first task I've been assigned since coming over to Orca... Are there any areas where I'm particularly lacking compared to Alpha-Big Sis?
1530000004.korean: 괜찮… 나요? 오르카로 건너와 처음 맡아본 업무인데… 알파 언니와 비교할 때 특히 부족한 부분은 없나요?

1530000005.english: - Although the tasks Beta was assigned were mainly those that Alpha was primarily in charge of,&nIf you were to compare her work ethic to that of a seasoned alpha, would it be significantly lacking? Absolutely not.
1530000005.korean: - 베타가 담당하게 된 업무는 주로 알파가 메인으로 진행하는 업무이긴 했지만, &n그녀의 일머리가 숙달된 알파와 비교해 현저히 떨어지냐 하면, 전혀 그렇지 않았다.

1530000006.english: - Hmm... is this the first time for Beta doing this kind of work?&nI glanced at Beta, and as expected, she was at a loss, fidgeting with her hair for no reason.
1530000006.korean: - 흐음… 베타한테 이런 종류의 일은 처음이던가?&n슬쩍 베타를 쳐다보니, 역시나 그녀는 어쩔 줄 몰라하며 괜스레 머리카락을 꼼질거렸다.

1530000007.english: Lord, Master... is there perhaps something wrong with the paperwork? If you entrust it to me again, this time I'll really do it properly...
1530000007.korean: 주, 주인님… 혹시 서류 상 뭔가 잘못된 게… 있어요? 다, 다시 맡겨 주시면, 이번엔 정말 제대로…

1530000009.english: - One thing I've noticed since Beta joined is that, unlike Alpha, she worries a lot and lacks confidence in everything.
1530000009.korean: - 베타의 합류 이후 한 가지 느낀 점이 있다면… 그녀는 알파와 달리 매사 걱정이 많고 자신감이 없다는 것이었다.

1530000010.english: - Although it's been said that the Lemonade Beta individuals have been used and discarded like expendables due to Simon's malice...
1530000010.korean: - 여태껏 레모네이드 베타의 개체들은 시몬의 악의에 의해 소모품처럼 쓰이고 버려졌다곤 하지만…

1530000012.english: - Actually, it's not so much that Beta is worried...

1530000013.english: If there's even the slightest thing that displeases you, please tell me… shall I prepare it in a different way?
1530000013.korean: 혹시 조금이라도 마음에 안 드신 게 있다면, 말씀해주세요... 다른 방향으로 준비해 볼까요?

1530000014.english: - Her excessive defense mechanisms stem from the anxiety that her actions might alienate me.&nIt looked as tho they were pushing the beta's fragile mental state, which seemed ready to burst at any moment.
1530000014.korean: - 그녀의 행동이 내게 반감을 살지도 모른다는 불안으로부터 온 과도한 방어 기제가 &n금방이라도 톡 터질 것만 같이 위태로운 베타의 정신력을 몰아세우고 있는 것처럼 보였다.

1530000016.korean: 혹시… 제 옷이 마음에 안 드세요?

1530000017.english: - I wasn't trying to criticize his attire, but... I was bothered by Beta's insistence on wearing all-black mourning clothes even after joining us.
1530000017.korean: - 복장을 지적하려는 건 아니었지만… 합류 후에도 여전히 새카만 상복을 고집하는 베타의 모습이 마음에 걸렸다.

1530000018.english: - Now that Beta has come to Orca too, I just wanted to see him wearing bright clothes and smiling beautifully.&nJust like the Sky Knights members who shone brighter than anyone else in their idol outfits...
1530000018.korean: - 베타도 이제 오르카에 왔으니 화사한 옷을 입고 예쁘게 웃는 모습이 보고 싶었을 뿐이다. &n아이돌 의상으로 누구보다 빛났던 스카이 나이츠 대원들 처럼…

1530000019.english: - While I'm at it, I should ask Audrey to make new beta clothes.
1530000019.korean: - 이참에 오드리한테 새로운 베타의 옷을 부탁해 봐야겠다.

1530000020.english: I'm sorry... I haven't prepared any other clothes beside mourning clothes yet... Should I borrow something from someone else and change?
1530000020.korean: 죄송해요… 아직 상복 말고는 따로 준비해둔 옷이 없는데… 다른 분께 빌려서라도 갈아입고 올까요?

1530000021.english: - Come to think of it... I've been so thoughtless that I haven't given Beta a memorable gift since he joined Orca.&nIf it had been another member, they would have at least looked out for their own, even if not for me personally...
1530000021.korean: - 그러고 보니... 베타가 오르카에 합류한 이후로 기념이 될 만한 선물 하나 해주지 못할 만큼 무신경했다.&n만약 다른 대원이었다면, 적어도 나를 대신해 같은 소속끼리 챙겨 줬을 텐데…

1530000022.english: Master, what are you saying? It's enough for me just to serve you.
1530000022.korean: 주인님, 무슨 말씀을… 저는 주인님을 모시는 것만으로도 충분해요.

1530000023.english: - Beta is trying to wave it off and smile, but... seeing him like that actually made me feel even more concerned.
1530000023.korean: - 베타는 애써 손사래를 치며 웃고있지만… 오히려 저런 모습을 보니 더더욱 마음이 걸려왔다.

1530000024.english: Huh? You don't need to do that! Um, if I... am too far from your taste... and I'm always dressed so plainly...
1530000024.korean: 네? 그러실 필요 없어요! 저, 혹시 제가… 주인님의 취향과 너무 멀고… 투박한 모습으로 다니는 거라면…

1530000025.english: - Beta glances at my expression from the corner of his eye.
1530000025.korean: - 베타가 곁눈질로 힐끔힐끔 내 표정을 살핀다.

1530000026.english: - Beta tapped his two index fingers together repeatedly, then nodded as if he had made a decision.
1530000026.korean: - 베타는 두 검지를 몇 번이고 맞대어 두드리다 결심이 들어선 듯 고개를 끄덕였다.

1530000027.english: Okay. If that's what you wish, Master... I'll wear it.
1530000027.korean: 알겠어요. 주인님 뜻이 그러시다면… 입고 올게요.

1530000028.english: A small smile forming on Beta's lips put my mind at ease.&nTo keep my promise to Beta, I summoned Audrey to the commander's office.
1530000028.korean: - 베타의 입가에 자그마한 호가 그려지자 마음이 놓였다.&n베타와 약속을 지키기 위해서, 나는 사령관실로 오드리를 호출했다.

1530000029.english: Commander, are you so busy these days that you even forget to stop by our salon?&nYou called me to the commander's office... that's a bit disappointing, isn't it? Hoo hoo...
1530000029.korean: 사령관, 요즘은 우리 살롱에 들리는 것도 깜빡할 정도로 바쁘신가요?&n사령관실로 절 부르시다니… 좀 아쉽네요? 후훗…

1530000030.english: Hmm… judging by the Commander's expression… are you asking me for a custom order?
1530000030.korean: 흐음… 사령관의 표정을 보니까… 제게 특별히 맞춤 제작을 부탁하시려는 걸까요?

1530000031.english: Commander? If you keep asking me for clothes without ever going on a date, I'm going to get angry, okay?
1530000031.korean: 사령관? 자꾸 데이트는 안 해주고 옷만 부탁하면, 저… 화낼 거예요?

1530000032.english: Hoo… and lately even the sisters aren't making the clothes they were told to, just running away.
1530000032.korean: 후우… 안 그래도 요즘 언니들도 만들라는 옷은 통 안 만들고 도망만 다니고 있단 말이에요.

1530000033.english: Commander... You'll have to take responsibility for those words, won't you? I'll definitely remember it.
1530000033.korean: 사령관... 그 말에 책임져야 할걸요? 꼭 기억하고 있을 거니까요.

1530000034.english: - I responded to Audrey's sulky pout with a smile.
1530000034.korean: - 오드리의 새침한 투정에 나는 미소로 화답했다.

1530000035.english: - I brought up the story of the beta to her, who had shrugged her shoulders as if to say, "I can't help it."&nHearing my wish that the design be as bright as possible, contrasting with mourning attire, she crossed her arms and rested her chin on her hand.
1530000035.korean: - 못말린다는 듯 어깨를 으쓱거리던 그녀에게 베타의 이야기를 꺼냈다.&n되도록 상복과 반대되는 화사한 디자인이면 좋겠다는 내 희망 사항을 듣던 그녀는 팔짱을 끼곤 턱을 괴었다.

1530000036.english: Hmm… I always have ideas, but… as expected, this one's a rather difficult request.
1530000036.korean: 흐음… 아이디어는 늘 있지만… 이번에도 역시나, 조금 어려운 주문이네요.

1530000037.english: Since Beta always wears black clothes, it's hard to picture him in bright colors.&nHonestly, the unique atmosphere, which is a bit gloomy, and...
1530000037.korean: 베타는 늘 블랙 계열의 옷만 입다보니, 화사한 톤이 머릿속에 잘 그려지진 않네요. &n솔직히 조금 우중충한 특유의 분위기도 그렇고…

1530000038.english: Hmm… besides, an outfit that can handle Beta's dynamite volume…
1530000038.korean: 흐음… 게다가 베타의 다이너마이트한 볼륨을 감당할 수 있는 옷이라…

1530000039.english: - Audrey tilted her head and chuckled at my cautious question.
1530000039.korean: - 내 조심스러운 질문에 오드리는 고개를 갸웃거리다 픽 웃었다.

1530000040.english: It's not impossible, but it might be a big challenge for me to overcome the various factors that could lead to failure.
1530000040.korean: 무리는 아니지만, 제게 있어선 여러가지 실패 요인에 맞설 큰 도전이 될지도 모르겠네요.

1530000042.english: Suddenly, the commander's office door burst open, and someone stumbled and fell with a thud.
1530000042.korean: - 별안간 사령관실 문이 벌컥 열리더니 누군가 우당탕 넘어졌다.

1530000043.english: - When Audrey and I turned around, Beta, who had fallen flat on his back, was standing up looking disheveled, unable to hide his startled expression.
1530000043.korean: - 나와 오드리가 뒤를 돌아보자 그곳엔 벌러덩 넘어졌던 베타가 엉망이된 모습으로 일어나 화들짝 놀란 표정을 감추지 못하고 서있었다.

1530000047.english: - After hesitating, Beta soon pulled a fountain pen from the buried documents.
1530000047.korean: - 머뭇거리던 베타는 이내, 파묻힌 서류 속에서 만년필 하나를 꺼내 들었다.

1530000049.english: I'm sorry... I'll be going now, Master.

1530000050.english: - Beta left the commander's office at a brisk pace before I could say another word.
1530000050.korean: - 베타는 내가 더 말할 새도 없이 빠른 걸음으로 사령관실을 나가버렸다.

1530000055.english: Huh? Don't be ridiculous. Just because you were on the Orca, do you think you're somebody now?
1530000055.korean: 하? 꼴값 떨긴요. 오르카 호에 있더니 뭐라도 된 줄 아세요?

1530000056.english: ...and yet, you're the most incompetent and weak of our clones.
1530000056.korean: …우리 클론 중 제일 무능하고 나약한 주제에.

1530000057.english: Are you pretending to be Beta on our behalf?
1530000057.korean: 우리를 대신해서 베타 님 행세를 하는 거예요?

1530000059.english: Ugh... gloomy and worse than a bum.

1530000061.english: Don't make that face like you're carrying the weight of the world's sadness on your own, you unfinished beta, the failed experiment of the clones.
1530000061.korean: 온 세상 슬픔은 혼자 다 짊어진 표정 짓지 마세요, 클론들 중 가장 되다만 베타 님의 실패작인 주제에.

1530000063.english: Okay, I got it. Do you want to leave it there?

1530000070.english: Why don't you try changing your style?
1530000070.korean: 한 번 스타일을 바꿔보는 게 어때?

1530000071.english: It's not that I don't like it...

1530000073.english: I haven't been able to give Beta a proper gift.
1530000073.korean: 내가 베타한테 제대로 된 선물 하나 못해줬네.

1530000074.english: I've been busy with one thing or another...

1530000075.english: Should I ask Audrey for a favor?

1530000076.english: I'll definitely make clothes that will suit Beta perfectly.
1530000076.korean: 베타한테 분명 어울릴 만한 옷을 만들어 줄 거야.

1530000077.english: That's not it. I want to do it for you.
1530000077.korean: 그런 거 아냐. 내가 해주고 싶어서 그래.

1530000078.english: I'm getting ready, but could you wear it and come over later?
1530000078.korean: 준비하려는데… 나중에 한 번 입고 와줄 수 있겠어?

1530000081.english: Okay... I'll definitely pay you back this debt later.
1530000081.korean: 알았어… 나중에 꼭 이 빚을 갚도록 할게.

1530000083.english: ...Are you saying you might create a failure?
1530000083.korean: …설마 실패작을 만들어 낼 지도 모른다는 소리?

1540000002.english: Wow... Saetti-nim... you're not wearing mourning clothes today?
1540000002.korean: 우와... 시에테님… 오늘은 상복을 안 입으셨네요?

1540000003.english: Oh, well... I usually have two sets of mourning clothes, but all the clothes I have haven't dried yet...&nBeta-nim lent me some clothes they used to wear.
1540000003.korean: 아 그게… 제 상복은 원래 두 벌인데… 가진 옷이 전부 아직 마르질 않아서…&n베타 님께서 예전에 입으셨던 옷을 제게 빌려주셨어요.

1540000004.english: That white suit looks amazing on you!  &nCan't you keep wearing such bright clothes from now on?
1540000004.korean: 흰색 정장도 엄청 잘 어울리시네요! &n앞으로도 그렇게 화사한 옷을 입고 다니시면 안 되나요?

1540000005.english: That's not okay... The other clones are also insisting on mourning clothes, so if I'm the only one walking around in these clothes...
1540000005.korean: 그건, 안 돼요... 다른 클론 분들도 상복을 고집하는데, 저 혼자서 이런 옷을 입고 다니면…

1540000006.english: That's a shame... It would be nice if everyone else wore clothes like this at least once in a while...
1540000006.korean: 아쉽네요… 한 번쯤 다른 분들도 모두 이런 옷을 입고 다니신다면 좋을텐데…

1540000007.english: ...If that day ever comes, I'll discuss it with everyone. Heh heh.
1540000007.korean: …만약, 그럴 날이 오게 된다면, 모두와 함께 고민해 볼게요. 후훗.

1540000010.english: ...Ha, isn't that the outfit that Beta-sama used to wear?&nArrogantly. Who told you to wear that?
1540000010.korean: …하, 그 옷은 예전 베타 님이 입고 다니시던 의복 아닌가요?&n건방지게. 누가 그걸 입으라고 한 거죠?

1540000011.english: Beta-nim said... "Are you going to go around in just your underwear?" and told me to wear this instead today...
1540000011.korean: 베타 님께서… 소, 속옷만 입고 다닐 거냐면서, 오늘은 이걸 대신 입고 다니라, 하셔서…

1540000012.english: ...Beta, you're being particularly protective of Siete.
1540000012.korean: …베타 님은 유난히 시에테만 싸고 도는 군요.

1540000013.english: Because you accept everything, they're getting pushy.

1540000014.english: I'm sorry... if it bothers you, I'll take it off.

1540000015.english: Are you just wearing it? Since you'll be in your underwear anyway, you can say something on my behalf or on behalf of Tres.
1540000015.korean: 그냥 입고 계시죠? 어차피 속옷 바람이면 저나 트레스한테 대신 한 소리 하실 테니.

1540000017.english: Anyway, Siete.&nLooking at the materials you submitted this time, it seems you requested more budget than necessary. Do you think money is overflowing in Caracas?
1540000017.korean: 그나저나 시에테. &n이번에 저희 쪽에 낸 자료를 보면, 필요 이상의 예산을 요구하셨던데. 카라카스에 돈이 남아도는 줄 아나요?

1540000018.english: Well, you see... District 7 has harsh conditions, so compared to other districts... We need to inject the budget quickly.
1540000018.korean: 그게… 7 구역은 열악한 환경이라, 다른 구역보다... 빠른 예산 투입이 필요해요.

1540000019.english: Hmph, those Bioroids of yours are too weak to even fight bugs properly anyway, aren't they?
1540000019.korean: 흥, 어차피 그쪽 바이오로이드들은 철충이랑 제대로 된 전투 한번 못할 정도로 나약하지 않던가요?

1540000020.english: If food isn't possible... please at least provide AGS units capable of maintaining public order...!
1540000020.korean: 식량이 안 된다면… 치안 유지를 할 정도의 AGS라도 지원 해주세요…!

1540000021.english: Siete, do you understand how difficult the situation is right now?&nWe don't have enough military strength to protect the androids in that area.
1540000021.korean: 시에테, 지금 상황이 얼마나 어려운 지 알고는 있나요?&n우린 그 지역 바이오로이드들을 지킬 만큼의 군사력을 가지고 있지 않아요.

1540000022.english: Hmph, then why don't you ask for help from the Omega or that high-and-mighty last human?
1540000022.korean: 풋, 그러면 오메가나 그 잘나신 마지막 인간님한테 도움이라도 요청해 보지 그러세요?

1540000024.english: What is it, Siete? What are you wearing?

1540000025.english: I washed all my spare clothes, so I had nothing to wear. I asked Beta-san for help...
1540000025.korean: 제 여분의 옷을 전부 세탁해서… 입을 옷이 없어서 베타 님께, 부탁드렸는데…

1540000028.english: Take that off, I'll give you new clothes. That outfit looks like Beta-nim gave it to you personally, doesn't it?
1540000028.korean: 새로 옷을 줄 테니까 그건 벗어요. 그 옷은 베타 님이 직접 주신 것처럼 보이는데요?

1540000030.english: Seven. Do you perhaps think you're a true beta?
1540000030.korean: 시에테. 혹시 자신이 진정한 베타라고 생각이라도 하시나 보죠?

1540000031.english: That's not what I was thinking, Quattro-san.
1540000031.korean: 그렇게 생각한 건 아니에요, 콰트로 님.

1540000032.english: Quattro. Do you want that outfit?

1540000033.english: Isn't that outfit something only Beta-san can wear? I've never worn it even once myself.
1540000033.korean: 저 옷은 베타 님만이 입을 수 있는 옷 아닌가요? 저 역시도 단 한 번 입어 본 적, 없단 말이죠.

1540000034.english: Ha, what, it seems like Quattro is the one pretending to be Beta-nim.
1540000034.korean: 하, 무슨, 콰트로야말로 베타 님 인척 행세하시는 것 같은데요.

1540000035.english: Are you going to fight? Your words are quite irritating.
1540000035.korean: 싸우기라도 하실 건가요? 언사가 상당히 거슬리네요.

1540000036.english: Beta-nim said not to fight each other, didn't he? I'll just take it off, so please stop now, everyone...
1540000036.korean: 서로 싸우지 말라고 베타님이 말씀하셨잖아요… 그냥 제가 벗을 테니까 이제 그만하세요, 다들…

1540000039.english: Why are you acting like this all of a sudden?

1540000040.english: - Cuatro grabbed Siete by the hair.&nSiete, whose hair was grabbed, struggled, but Cuatro gritted his teeth and continued speaking.
1540000040.korean: - 콰트로는 시에테의 머리채를 휘어잡았다.&n머리채가 잡힌 시에테가 버둥거렸지만 콰트로는 이를 갈며 말을 이었다.

1540000042.english: Ahhh...! Ouch... Ugh... Why... why are you doing this all of a sudden, Quattro-san...?
1540000042.korean: 꺄악…! 아읏… 으읏… 갑자기 왜… 왜, 이러세요, 콰트로 님…?

1540000043.english: Want to know a fun fact?&nRight now, Uno-san and Beta-san are strangely accommodating Siete, aren't they?
1540000043.korean: 재밌는 사실 하나 가르쳐 드려요? &n지금 우노 님이나, 베타 님은 이상하리 만치 시에테 편의를 봐주고 있단 말이죠?

1540000044.english: I'm sorry, I'm so sorry, I make a lot of mistakes... because I'm stupid... Aaaah!
1540000044.korean: 죄, 죄송해요, 제가 실수도 많고… 바보 같아서… 꺄아아악!

1540000045.english: ...Why is that? Why did it have to be the weakest, most powerless, most useless, and on top of all that... this utterly gloomy trash of a clone among us?
1540000045.korean: …왜 그럴까요? 왜 하필 우리 클론들 중 가장 나약하고, 힘도 없고, 무 쓸모인 것도 모자라… 음침하기 짝이 없는 이딴 쓰레기를…

1540000049.english: You're acting like you have a huge grudge against Siete. Well... it's not my job, but.
1540000049.korean: 시에테한테 크게 쌓인 것처럼 구는군요. 뭐… 제 알바는 아니지만.

1540000050.english: Isn't Dos-san second to none when it comes to tormenting Saetti? It's all the same anyway.
1540000050.korean: 도스 님이야말로 시에테를 괴롭히는 건 둘째가라면 서러울 정도 아닌가요, 어차피 피차일반일 텐데.

1540000051.english: Let's stop it, or we'll be the only ones getting blamed if things get worse later.
1540000051.korean: 그만하시죠, 나중에 일 커지면 또 우리만 욕먹으니.

1540000052.english: Hoo, yes. Let's do that. But… haah… but that white suit.
1540000052.korean: 후우, 네. 그렇게 하죠. 그런데… 하아…근데 저 흰색 정장.

1540000053.english: The more I look at it, the worse it makes me feel.

1540000054.english: - Quattro grabbed the fallen Siete by the scruff of the neck and began shaking him mercilessly.
1540000054.korean: - 콰트로는 쓰러진 시에테의 멱살을 붙잡곤 사정없이 흔들기 시작했다.

1540000055.english: As the lowest-ranking clone among us, where do you get the audacity to imitate Beta-nim? Are you challenging us?
1540000055.korean: 우리 중 제일 서열이 낮은 클론 주제에 어디서 베타 님 흉내를 내고 있죠? 설마 우리에 대한 도전인가요?

1540000056.english: I'm sorry, Quattro-sama... I was wrong... It's Beta-sama's clothes, please...!
1540000056.korean: 죄, 죄송해요, 콰트로 님… 제가, 잘못했어요… 베타 님 옷이에요, 제발...!

1540000060.english: I've never seen Quattro get that angry before.
1540000060.korean: 콰트로가 저렇게까지 화내는 건 처음 보군요.

1540000061.english: Didn't you always bully Siete the most when no one was watching?
1540000061.korean: 원래부터 시에테를 안 보이는 데서 제일 많이 괴롭히지 않았나요?

1540000062.english: Well, in a way, he is the most eccentric of our clones.&n...Well, even so, it's still better than that child over there, who's the most naive and foolish."
1540000062.korean: 하기야 어떻게 보면 우리 클론들 중 가장 괴짜긴 하죠.&n…뭐, 그렇다고 해도 제일 순진하고 멍청한 저 아이보단 낫겠지만.

1540000063.english: Come to think of it, doesn't Siete still respect Simon... that guy?
1540000063.korean: 시에테는 그러고 보니, 아직도 시몬… 그 인간을 존경한다죠?

1540000064.english: It's a curse placed upon the androids.&nNo matter how unreasonable a human's command may be, it's our fate to obey.
1540000064.korean: 바이오로이드에게 내려진 저주죠. &n인간의 명령이 아무리 불합리해도 들어야 하는 운명이에요.

1540000065.english: Siete? I heard you enjoy listening to the last human's broadcasts...
1540000065.korean: 시에테? 마지막 인간의 방송을 즐겨 듣는다는 소문이 있던데…

1540000067.english: Just remember this one thing clearly: why we have to live like these clones.
1540000067.korean: 이것 하나만 똑똑히 기억하세요, 우리가 왜 이런 클론 꼴로 살아야 하는지.

1540000070.english: It's just... something from a long time ago...

1540000072.english: My master treats me incredibly well, almost too well...
1540000072.korean: 주인님은 내게 분이 넘칠 정도로 잘 해주시지만…

1540000073.english: ...What kind of lemonade am I to the master?&nDoes my master... even like this side of me?
1540000073.korean: …난 주인님께 어떤 레모네이드지?&n이런 내 모습을 주인님은… 마음에 들어 하시긴 하는 걸까?

1550000001.english: Beta, you haven't been showing up for the gourmet club lately, and... wait? Beta...
1550000001.korean: 베타, 요즘 갑자기 미식회도 나오지 않고 뭘… 어라? 베타…

1550000004.english: Your dark circles under your eyes are really dark. Have you been having trouble sleeping lately?
1550000004.korean: 눈 밑 다크서클이 짙은데, 요새 잠을 잘 못 자는 거야?

1550000005.english: You look a bit more haggard than usual...?

1550000007.english: No, um... Well, Mr. Beta... when I said you looked haggard, I didn't mean it that way...
1550000007.korean: 아니, 그. 그러니까요, 베타 씨… 초췌해 보인다는 말은 그런 뜻으로 말한 게 아니고…

1550000008.english: ...Judging by the way you look right now, it seems you wouldn't even know what's going into your mouth.
1550000008.korean: …보아하니 지금 그 모습으론 입에 뭐가 들어가는 지도 모를 것 같고.

1550000009.english: ...I'm sorry. I just feel like being alone today...
1550000009.korean: …죄송해요. 오늘은 왠지… 좀 혼자 있고 싶어서요.

1550000010.english: It seemed like you hadn't left your room for several days, Mr. Beta?
1550000010.korean: 며칠째 계속 방 밖으로 안 나오신 것 같았는데요, 베타 씨?

1550000014.english: ... I'm sorry. I didn't sleep well, so... My nerves...

1550000016.english: You need to get enough sleep before you can have an appetite.&nRest comfortably, and then later, slowly again...
1550000016.korean: 수면욕이 충족돼야 식욕도 따르는 법이야.&n편히 쉰 다음 나중에 다시 천천히…

1550000018.english: Come back and... have a good time...

1550000020.english: "A good time"? Seven. What do you think would be different just because you're the last human?&nYou must know how the final invitation beta ended.
1550000020.korean: 즐거운 시간'? 시에테. 마지막 인간이라고 해서 뭐가 다를 것 같나요?&n초대 베타 님의 최후가 어떤진 당신도 알 텐데.

1550000021.english: How dare you... betray us and side with the last human?
1550000021.korean: 감히… 우리 뒤통수를 치고 마지막 인간한테 붙어요?

1550000026.english: Please don't abandon me... I can serve my master well... sigh...
1550000026.korean: 절 버리지 말아주세요… 주인님을 잘 모실 수 있는… 하아…

1550000030.english: ...Oh, the task the master entrusted to me... I still have a lot left to do.
1550000030.korean: …아, 주인님께서 맡기신 일… 아직 많이 남았는데.

1550000032.english: ...anyway, even if it's not me... Alpha-Big Sis or... the others here would be much better at it.
1550000032.korean: …어차피 제가 아니여도... 알파 언니나… 여기 계신 다른 분들이 훨씬 더 잘 하실 텐데.

1550000033.english: Beta? Beta? Are you here by any chance? Are you feeling sick or in pain somewhere? I heard recently that he suddenly hasn't been coming out of his room.
1550000033.korean: 베타? 베타? 혹시 여기 있어요? 어디 아픈 곳이라도 있는 거예요? 근래 들어 갑자기 방에서 나오질 않는다는 얘길 들었어요.

1550000035.english: - Huh, isn't today the day Beta was supposed to handle the secretary duties instead of Alpha...?&nI was at work, waiting for the briefing, when I noticed no one was around, which made me wonder.
1550000035.korean: - 어라, 오늘은 베타가 알파를 대신해서 비서 업무를 보기로 한 날인데…?&n출근하고 브리핑을 기다리던 중 아무도 보이지 않아 의문이 들었다.

1550000037.english: - I had given Alpha a vacation since he'd had so much work to handle, and I was wondering why he'd already come back.&nJust then, Alpha, pale as a ghost, suddenly asked me in a serious tone.
1550000037.korean: - 그간 맡은 업무가 많았던 알파에게 휴가를 주었는데, 무슨 사유로 벌써 돌아온 걸까 싶던 그때였다.&n사색이 된 알파가, 대뜸 내게 진지한 어조로 물었다.

1550000038.english: Master... I heard Beta hasn't been leaving his room lately... Did anything happen while I was away?
1550000038.korean: 주인님… 최근 베타가 방에서 나오질 않는다는데… 제가 없는 동안 혹시 무슨 일이라도 있었어요?

1550000039.english: Yes... I've tried to talk to them, but they won't come out of their room. This is the first time something like this has happened, so...&nBy any chance, did something happen between you and the master?"
1550000039.korean: 네… 대화를 해보려 해도 문밖으로 나오질 않아서요, 이런 적은 처음이라…&n혹시 주인님이랑 베타 사이에 무슨 일이 있었던 건 아니시죠?

1550000040.english: - I had no idea what had happened to Beta, but...&nJust one thing: I remembered my recent conversation with Beta and told Alpha that I had tried to give Audrey's clothes to her.
1550000040.korean: - 베타한테 무슨 일이 있었던 건지 짐작가는 바가 전혀 없었지만… &n단 하나, 최근 베타와의 대화를 떠올렸고, 그녀에게 오드리의 옷을 선물하려 했다는 이야기를 알파에게 꺼냈다.

1550000041.english: ...Well. With such fragmented information, it's not easy to understand why Beta is acting this way.
1550000041.korean: …글쎄요. 그런 단편적인 얘기로는 베타가 왜 이러는 건지 쉽사리 이해 가지 않네요.

1550000042.english: Hmm… I've heard rumors you look very tired…  &nIt'd be best to let Beta rest comfortably with some ease. In the meantime, I'll investigate the things that seemed odd about Beta.
1550000042.korean: 흐음… 소문으로는 무척 피곤해 보인다는 말이 많던데…&n여유를 갖고 베타가 편히 쉴 수 있도록 배려해 주는 게 좋을 것 같아요. 전 그동안 다른 분들께 베타의 이상해 보였던 점들에 대해 조사해 볼게요.

1550000043.english: - I really wanted to go and see him right away, but... I decided to trust Alpha's caution and wait a little longer.
1550000043.korean: - 마음 같아선 당장 찾아가 보고 싶었지만… 알파의 신중함을 믿고 잠시 기다리기로 했다.

1550000044.english: I'm not sleepy even after taking a walk. Normally, I'd be sleepy...
1550000044.korean: 산책을 해도 졸리지 않아. 보통이라면 잠이 올 텐데...

1550000045.english: Fortunately, the master gave me a vacation, but... this isn't right... I should be showing the master how well I'm doing...
1550000045.korean: 주인님께선 다행히 휴가를 주시긴 했지만… 이러면 안 되는데… 주인님한테 잘하는 모습, 보여드려야 할 텐데…

1550000046.english: I shouldn't do what I did that disappointed Simon...&nI can't keep living like this, bound by the past...
1550000046.korean: 시몬 님께 실망시켜드렸던 것처럼 하면 안 되는데…&n더는 이렇게 과거에 얽매여 살 수 없는 노릇인데…

1550000047.english: I've never thot of you as my daughter. Get a grip, consumable.
1550000047.korean: 난 널 딸이라고 생각한 적 없다. 정신차려라, 소모품.

1550000048.english: Why... why do you think of me that way...? Father... no, Chairman...?
1550000048.korean: 어째서… 어째서 절 그렇게 생각하시는 건가요… 아버지… 아니, 회장님...?

1550000049.english: If you can't do a single thing I ask properly, what exactly can you do on your own, Siete?
1550000049.korean: 시킨 일 하나도 제대로 못 하면 대체 혼자 할 줄 아는 게 뭐죠, 시에테?

1550000050.english: ...you can do it well. I can do better, you know.
1550000050.korean: …잘할 수 있어요. 저, 더 잘할 수 있다고요.

1550000051.english: Is the cake going down your throat now, Siete? How much more of the 7th District's budget do we have to pour in because of you?
1550000051.korean: 지금 케이크가 목구멍에 넘어가나요, 시에테? 당신 때문에 7구역 예산을 얼마나 더 쏟아부어야 하는 거죠?

1550000052.english: We could all live together, why are you being so cold?
1550000052.korean: 모두 같이 살면 되잖아요, 어째서 그렇게 냉정하신 거죠?

1550000053.english: Why are you defending a useless failure? I'm much stronger, you know... I'm much more useful!
1550000053.korean: 쓸모 없는 실패작을 어째서, 감싸고 도는 거죠? 제가 훨씬 강하잖아요… 제가, 훨씬 쓸모 있잖아요!
